name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Bryce Reeves Claims Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Bryce Reeves has emerged victorious
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000187f38df539-49a0f893-d28e-4a63-9080-5054b01c3fb9-000000/47fIGCfoX60-NlEkCo3jY_HV7Oo=320)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEContactNICK DUBERNICK@brycereeves.com
---
| SENATOR REEVES CLAIMS VICTORY IN THE REPUBLICAN FIREHOUSE PRIMARY FOR THE 28TH SENATE DISTRICT
---
| [Culpeper, VA] - Bryce Reeves has emerged victorious in the Republican Firehouse Primary for the 28th Senate District in Virginia. With 76% of the vote, Reeves secured a landslide win over his opponents, Mike Allers Sr. Reeves has been a dedicated public servant and a staunch advocate for his constituents throughout his career. He has served as a member of the Virginia Senate since 2012 and has consistently fought for conservative values and the interests of his district. In his victory speech, Reeves expressed his gratitude to his supporters and pledged to continue to fight for the principles that he and his constituents hold dear. He emphasized his commitment to limited government, lower taxes, and individual freedom, and promised to work tirelessly to improve the lives of the people of the 28th Senate District. "I am deeply honored and humbled by the trust that the voters of the 28th Senate District have placed in me," Reeves said. "I promise to continue to be a tireless advocate for our shared values and to work every day to make our community an even better place to live, work, and raise a family." Reeves' victory in the Republican Firehouse Primary sets the stage for an exciting general election campaign in the fall. The people of the 28th Senate District can be confident that they have a champion in Bryce Reeves, and that he will work hard to represent their interests and fight for their rights in the Virginia Senate. For more information about Bryce Reeves and his campaign, please visit www.brycereeves.com.
---
| ###Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. Senator Reeves is running for re-election into the newly formed 28th Senate District. The counties within this district include: Orange, Culpeper, Madison, Greene, Rappahannock, Fauquier (part), and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves currently serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---

name: Team Lori
subject: Did you see this?
body:

Oprah Winfrey has undertaken an extraordinary career journey that made her, among other things, the first woman to own and produce her own talk show, a 2013 recipient of the Presidential Medal of Freedom, and one of the few celebrities famous enough to be known solely on a first-name basis.
[](http://track.interestingfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&emc_click_&url_encode_email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&url_encode_partnerCode=&url_encode_partnerSubcode=&url_encode_li_user_id=88217d43925b34ff8de583d32eba0748)

| [Why We Knock on Wood, and the Origins of 7 Other Superstitions](http://track.interestingfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&emc_click_&url_encode_email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&url_encode_partnerCode=&url_encode_partnerSubcode=&url_encode_li_user_id=88217d43925b34ff8de583d32eba0748)
---
Are you careful around ladders, mirrors, and salt? In many cases, the origins of these superstitions have multiple layers, meaning they might go back to pagan, Christian, medieval, or Victorian beliefs all at once. In other cases, the story is far more modern than you might think.
[](http://track.interestingfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&emc_click_&url_encode_email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&url_encode_partnerCode=&url_encode_partnerSubcode=&url_encode_li_user_id=88217d43925b34ff8de583d32eba0748)

---
| [8 Dazzling Facts About the Sun](http://track.interestingfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&emc_click_&url_encode_email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&url_encode_partnerCode=&url_encode_partnerSubcode=&url_encode_li_user_id=88217d43925b34ff8de583d32eba0748)
---
The sun is the real star of our show — pun intended. Hanging out 93 million miles away, it’s a perfect mixture of hydrogen and helium that spit-roasts our planet just right. Here are some of the most interesting things we’ve learned about the sun, and some of our best guesses on its future.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: No one thought I could win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62921360/404998822/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTUxNTZkNTQtN2ZlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6d1tKZB50de_X5lDvNawYF3OB0WZfRzWJf51qIE8so=)
---
Can I tell you a story, Peter? **When I first decided to run for Congress in 1997, no one thought I could win. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62921361/404998823/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTUxNTZkNTQtN2ZlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6d1tKZB50de_X5lDvNawYF3OB0WZfRzWJf51qIE8so=) People in powerful positions told me it wasn’t my turn and that I should step aside in favor of a more popular challenger. But I knew this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. **I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin.** And I got right to work to improve our health care system and protect benefits for seniors from Republican budget cuts. When I ran for the U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62921362/404998824/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTUxNTZkNTQtN2ZlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6d1tKZB50de_X5lDvNawYF3OB0WZfRzWJf51qIE8so=) In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we _won._ Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us to work together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. **It’s not going to be easy, Peter. But we’ve defied the odds before, and I certainly know we can do it again. That’s why I’m asking:** [_**Will you help us protect this seat and the Democratic Senate majority by splitting a donation between HER Time and my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62921363/404998825/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTUxNTZkNTQtN2ZlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6d1tKZB50de_X5lDvNawYF3OB0WZfRzWJf51qIE8so=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62921364/404998826/-523917261?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230506_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTUxNTZkNTQtN2ZlYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6d1tKZB50de_X5lDvNawYF3OB0WZfRzWJf51qIE8so=)

clean_body: | = Can I tell you a story, Peter? When I first decided to run for Congress in 1997, no one thought I could win. = People in powerful positions told me it wasn’t my turn and that I should step aside in favor of a more popular challenger. But I knew this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And I got right to work to improve our health care system and protect benefits for seniors from Republican budget cuts. When I ran for the U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. = In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us to work together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. It’s not going to be easy, Peter. But we’ve defied the odds before, and I certainly know we can do it again. That’s why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t thank you enough for that. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. — Tammy = HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I was forced to compete against a biological male
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
’ve been threatened, slandered, and physically assaulted because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dNtWhrEd9hmnbOVnJEOLqw&sysid=1)
---
| | Hi there Friend, I’m Riley Gaines. If you aren’t familiar with my story, I’ve been _threatened_ , _slandered,_ and _physically assaulted_ because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes. You see, I’m a **12-time All-American swimmer** and **former NCAA athlete with 5 SEC titles**. Being the daughter of two college athletes, it was instilled in me at an early age that dedication and hard work are needed to compete at the highest level of athletics. My whole world revolved around living, breathing, and working to improve my abilities as a swimmer and athlete. **But that world was turned upside down in 2022. ** **At the 2022 NCAA Women’s Swimming Championships, I was forced to use the same locker room as and compete against Lia Thomas, a biological male.**
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS >>> **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j3G8Mg4FSN8181%2fwI7OZLg&sysid=1)
---
Despite Thomas and I tying in the 200m freestyle race, NCAA officials handed Thomas the trophy, **denying me that moment of achievement I had worked my entire life towards. ** I remember wondering why no one stood up for any of us women in the room. **That’s when my life changed, and I knew what I needed to do.** **I spoke up for every woman at that pool who felt what I felt but feared the consequences.** And I now work with an organization dedicated to fighting for female athletes-** sign up to learn more about my fight here >> ****[https://www.iwv.org/campaign/protect-womens-sports/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e%2bGIT6EpIYLdp9CARrlkXA&sysid=1)** **And after I spoke up, I quickly realized I wasn’t alone. ** Leaders like Congresswoman Claudia Tenney and others are standing up with me to ensure no other female athletes have to experience what we did that day.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TmLLdTC6ar8TflGf2%2f%2b0cw&sysid=1)
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS >>> **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j3G8Mg4FSN8181%2fwI7OZLg&sysid=1)
---
Congresswoman Tenney recently played a pivotal role in helping pass legislation to protect women’s sports. **We are determined to see this fight through to the end, but we need your help.** [**By adding your name today, you will support the fight to protect the integrity of women's sports and ensure that future female athletes like me never have to experience what I did. >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666898%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rnjcCtABip%2fwt5Wmu%2f03rA&sysid=1)
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS: SIGN NOW >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666899%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=muKN9b5wTp13OW3OcIAa%2fg&sysid=1)
---
| | Thank you,
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TmLLdTC6ar8TflGf2%2f%2b0cw&sysid=1)
---
Riley Gaines **P.S. If you’d like to support and follow my fight directly for women’s sports, please sign up here:** **[https://www.iwv.org/campaign/protect-womens-sports/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e%2bGIT6EpIYLdp9CARrlkXA&sysid=1)**

clean_body: ’ve been threatened, slandered, and physically assaulted because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes. | | | | | Hi there Friend, I’m Riley Gaines. If you aren’t familiar with my story, I’ve been threatened , slandered, and physically assaulted because I dared to speak up for my fellow female athletes. You see, I’m a 12-time All-American swimmer and former NCAA athlete with 5 SEC titles. Being the daughter of two college athletes, it was instilled in me at an early age that dedication and hard work are needed to compete at the highest level of athletics. My whole world revolved around living, breathing, and working to improve my abilities as a swimmer and athlete. But that world was turned upside down in 2022. At the 2022 NCAA Women’s Swimming Championships, I was forced to use the same locker room as and compete against Lia Thomas, a biological male. Despite Thomas and I tying in the 200m freestyle race, NCAA officials handed Thomas the trophy, denying me that moment of achievement I had worked my entire life towards. I remember wondering why no one stood up for any of us women in the room. That’s when my life changed, and I knew what I needed to do. I spoke up for every woman at that pool who felt what I felt but feared the consequences. And I now work with an organization dedicated to fighting for female athletes- sign up to learn more about my fight here >> And after I spoke up, I quickly realized I wasn’t alone. Leaders like Congresswoman Claudia Tenney and others are standing up with me to ensure no other female athletes have to experience what we did that day. Congresswoman Tenney recently played a pivotal role in helping pass legislation to protect women’s sports. We are determined to see this fight through to the end, but we need your help. | | Thank you, Riley Gaines P.S. If you’d like to support and follow my fight directly for women’s sports, please sign up here: | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | | | American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z35a0iv31ar5np5sp0ea2higtnk3s196i5d3j9eo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hffc9gchoedcr3c4q6bdb5meom4ohim1qb4djlm6pb6pbmcli66clncpp3atpjc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7mthmcdb4mmr3fcjjcor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsah9quoo2p5o0gh9p01atug9r9mcj3c56fvo50_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor6c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z87hcqrs0c8354o4fosqcmodtk2uiilkaasp7ol8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor6c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv6o6oj1t9ur3pt4ebi8svvhr0kf6vtl22eq1ano_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor6c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zesrjhbgre2ppeait3gm9il323emu3ojtssovm90_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn95md17vdmkl81i17bbg5n95esm8v2sc7ksvcno_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrli351lg36f1gu3uqspjeovngrh6pral37cituo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuaqlsiom88tr06q71em55a4ba1t52331dosgcc0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1big355t7pg830n5475ghkurjp9locgetp3e6rg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjgn7bdb50vo0t9subs13k7en8ulrfsffm6qo6ko_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zai5g5eq8jcpokpj9jhmdqoq6f4kj7li1ucmspbg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmmsvn5eaafscc3vnost50sj50dmn9fedubucp0o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp2s2tq8tbpmh763goak9rb9im2g3ngousdnghq0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bc45jhjprb9hdoshldv4heu66jmd2au6blnel0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zovnab7t5e05od0mka63m156astplmvuphisgol8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1b9a6esfgjbsmmnau4g1ku1uc15t4ktouruiteg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3t8rk43elg84p5areb62ol5tb3e821ra2pmb2ho_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor1clh2bs)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlsug56o33l6831fu7ruqnnrfb9kgmbfosncrddo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6gfbp1uujnmpb1u3cq7fgh4q5j4pq0ricase9l0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor2cph2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

---

Friend, I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu2nkr3u788p71vcd0bt8iupcbp4otqhrvjvl4d0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [YES TIM, I'M WITH YOU!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0pc207fsb988tc84oktuo6jurkn9la60oov4pmo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zflpck0o47g19n40ol514qq51n0j7or0rpmsmsno_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: I have a book for you
body:
Do you know how easy it is to awaken the next generation to the value of free market economics?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl9srtugr1qn4954dmf6c1bj7sgh1fiijd0v4bl8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
Hello Friend,

Do you know how easy it is to awaken the next generation to the value of free market economics?

All you have to do is show them a pencil...

You might be wondering, _" How can something as simple as a pencil teach students about a subject as complicated as economics?"_

Let me show you how.

**The book "I, Pencil" by Foundation for Economic Education's Founder, Leonard E. Read, is a resource we use to educate Gen Z through our flagship FEE in the Classroom program.**
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc0774hts8qfqj4abqlsdn8tnre879b2mibcdqao_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
This classic essay beautifully illustrates the marvelous interconnectivity of the marketplace, told from the viewpoint of a common pencil - _an item nearly everyone uses but no single person can make alone_.

**And this week, if you support the Foundation of Economic Education with $10 or more, I will send you a copy of"I, Pencil."**

Let me introduce myself. I am the President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), Lawrence Reed. My goal is to raise $50,000 to support FEE in the Classroom.

[I encourage you to read this book, Friend, so if you donate $10, $25, $50, or more, I will send your copy of "I, Pencil." _Click here to claim your copy_ _ >>>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zunq1et3l4irv5qkv972aj3ivk87of9iejiorg0o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)

**Your gift helps FEE build a future of freedom with the next generation through our programs like FEE in the Classroom.**

FEE in the Classroom counters radical socialist indoctrination by teaching young Americans the principles of individual liberty, limited government, and free-market economics.

FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors provide compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, Q&As, and educational materials, like "I, Pencil," in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country.

I'm proud to say that FEE taught over 55,000 students through FEE in the Classroom last year.

**FEE in the Classroom makes the ideas of liberty more familiar, credible, compelling, and engaging to students. **

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmoqrvk1n94cdq5r4ls5jgk8vcpr6tmq0phnq2n8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Your support helps FEE teach the principles of liberty and free markets to the next generation. Even a donation of $100, $50, $25, or just $10 has a HUGE impact. Click here to donate and get your copy of "I, Pencil" >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcl1d4r6b8hs89vf9k1glcfm4of1gsp8ljtkgds8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
Over the last decade, FEE has become the global leader in reaching young people with the legal, economic, and ethical principles of a free society.

**In 2022 alone, more than 146 MILLION Gen Z interacted with FEE 's social media posts, videos, and online articles. **We gained nearly 70,000 followers across Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn. Our YouTube channels are growing in popularity. Our FEE Online and Common Sense Soapbox channels received more than 23 MILLION views.

Our digital content and in-person programs turn complex ideas into practical tools to help students learn how to live their best life and make the world a better place.

Can you help me reach my goal of raising $50,000 for FEE in the Classroom and **get your copy of "I, Pencil" this week** by clicking any link below?
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9f386stgtj2k11ubplmgld94u7q5f9d2putqf90_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate $25 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z35j0t1vpgohfabm0b5pkstjjdemdokad8iil8ro_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znqfddlksbj8thlnrfour08benjk5o3b328va9go_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zltps1v9g3siqpkgnfo6ne61p6o935lkljhs0itg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6aevjkqmq028q5fc369akaudd9tl8tditnco1q0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfu14ic745blagggfjemudluvcl6e44m035acutg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qq20nsvrusguupn42dkvossaqk2hvd36bn6998_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3qpgq4r5jhvf41qcek3hmemf1raa98diejmoo2o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)
I have a long history of using books to fight socialism.

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books (and raised money to support book smuggling) into Eastern European countries such as Poland and the Soviet Union itself.

I knew the risk to my life and freedom. But I also knew if the people there had any hope of freeing themselves from the shackles of socialism, they needed access to the ideas of liberty and free markets.

Now I want to use "I, Pencil" to keep that fight going by encouraging you to support FEE's mission.

[You can support FEE -- and receive a copy of the book, "I, Pencil" by Leonard E. Read -- by clicking here >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm01o0c056chh0bd1ajulpggm4rm3e7gjdcpk8ro_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imeoj4cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Lawrence Reed
President Emeritus

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._ /p>

1600 Daily
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zibd3od7i88i8g5lcff2pntl8r9ht5vadqbk45gg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5imcor6c3h2bs "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

body:

Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10033%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kt%2brl8bqLsvCL3f6R1RQiQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10034%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ruz3ffBrAiNRTR0yoxfv3A&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10045%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HdSzZfGW5w3K2%2bNXaTxbHQ&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10046%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KtEkCAVzcepqOafp7ZWdvw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: You’ll be surprised who’sbeing cancelled next
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmb3fdhhn568vf8337sr23236ken8qthu16q2km8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5im9o34cth2bs)
---
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5a41offdov53bo106e6k97mn6vedso79lb7j5lo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5im9o34cth2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zel26c0hksbfmhu3m4a50469otieb88m4e53m7o0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5im9o34cth2bs).
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5jn7p86aperha78clrbufibuqdnu4ge520ul088_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5im9o34cth2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znotu206v5tjjsjqo9f9ddhi6is4815momsvte58_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5im9o34cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu9guccvl8omm0lka84up3jl41mc3pv36mi2qfl8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5im9o34cth2bs)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Your input matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
This will only take a few minutes

| | | Fellow American, When I decided to run for Senate, I did it because I was ready to fight for the values that keep American families strong.
But if we’re going to finish our fight and take back America from the radical Left, I need your help.
**Our team put together a survey for our most dedicated patriots on the biggest issues facing America today, and your input is CRITICAL for us to forge a winning path forward.**

name: PragerU
subject: Where do you stand on transgender ideology?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTI3LWRjZDgxMWRhYTQwZDRkM2I5MTdlYjU4MGRjNTc1MjJmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5zdXJ2ZXltb25rZXkuY29tL3IvS0czNkxSMz9OPVNQTzM4NzE2In0/peL8nO3vSbceo8n6ZdT_ag)
---
Dear Fellow American, Have you heard about "Drag Queen Story Hour" for young children being held in schools and libraries? How do you feel about "sex ed" lessons that encourage kids to question their sexual identity and tell them they can be a boy or a girl-or something in between? What about kids reading graphic and sexually explicit books as part of a required school curriculum? Children from kindergarten to high school are being exposed to, and influenced by, extreme gender ideologies and highly inappropriate sexualized content in thousands of taxpayer-funded public schools across the country. _**This is happening in nearly every state!**_ At the same time, radical activists in our education system, together with politicians, the media, and the medical establishment, are promoting "gender-affirming care" as the only acceptable method of treating children who believe they are not the sex they were born with. This so-called "care" includes radical interventions such as puberty blocking, mastectomies, facial surgeries, and even genital removal _for_** _teenagers_**. It's especially important now to understand where Americans stand on these matters.
---
[**Take The Survey Now**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTI3LWRjZDgxMWRhYTQwZDRkM2I5MTdlYjU4MGRjNTc1MjJmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5zdXJ2ZXltb25rZXkuY29tL3IvS0czNkxSMz9OPVNQTzM4NzE2In0/o-BoqOmcbURHSXeyjD7egQ)

---
[**Take The Survey Now**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

---
**Sincerely, ** **Prager U**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zntqgtkbl8pj9g4lv2gmpq0hd6gol6fuiqev65ug_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zorb2129acgmkg4hs3irq4ti2vbvpg53lhpvmcv0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8pg4pgn09cmgku8jco4pot3h5r3008ab2ntjhvo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zln90dcafq6mvoojk9lvmoeg2hhijfm4phg3k0v8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1tqq0u1u8na1mhiiuh63nd581f8v4eug1ok7740_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2u03a75nupa5vmvvqql7nfh0jiufrgbj99ubke8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8s1c84odrobqg8kge07hm5re4431h7793c7lqcg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9eodaosekn1g3u354n9rc2jehk93ggv1ktsm518_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvni5n7krult3cteht0iooibpsovmboagmrus1n0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z083ublv7dicigvbmqpb7sjqfslleeigo9selb2o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc1uuslsi63vevcjjoma5mp3urusfpe6rbuempk0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlcnjlsh8apgp9snmu5m6ltc3epcc2j078jd773o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)

---

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1cpprph8lttmohtb0l074nh4mu7450icbuuallo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlj56a3hq4smqac6mjcnvo6ufns77v8697acb588_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z56cgmhd0769l6pa1knhm5n87la81oj2rls445i0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o74cph2bs)
---|---|---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: American Action News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
What strange times we live in.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z44sn0qjpqh9md76k8s1886sui7qfkuqfg33ph28_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

What strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire--all while authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic parishes in the United States?

How about the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that forced many houses of worship to close?

These news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it seems like **faith in America is under siege.**

That's one reason we're releasing our latest free online course, **" Ancient Christianity,"** this month. I hope you'll enroll today using this secure link:
**
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuoq3bchff9ct9g9smvfl55et5dfvutbkdopbd6g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h2bs)
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2kna6eav9eeng9ph894hfr8tjhimarpioo31q0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h2bs)**

The course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same time, they shaped the Christian church and established the foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

**Their examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.**

For instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and immorality.

That's why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting** "Ancient Christianity"** to millions of your fellow citizens.

To achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by midnight on **May 22** to share this important free online course with as many people as possible.

The faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online courses possible. You also allow us to **reach** and **teach** millions through other educational outreach efforts, like _Imprimis_ and our K-12 education programs.

And every supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY PENNY of taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants.

We must educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and set an example for us to follow.

So, will you help us reach and teach people just like you--urging them to enroll in **" Ancient Christianity"**?

Using this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or any amount.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0vfrv7l69135pp4buupbfa491h6iapjvn0sjc0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h2bs)
**
Together, we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for the next generation of Americans--so they don't have to live through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4l18k9dge08a0fglf7hssa0k05gv8b7u7pvg6j8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp30cjieaob1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaukfrej08nikpkv35nf5fnheqqad4ndlj05g0m0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvd7njeubkjrnane5qvps06sl41f6nu7m3n6it0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

[I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52805c92-359b-4abb-b2c5-f9b81358c5b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda2e3c42-f3d6-4ff8-be1b-fd12c2840855/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: How a single pencil destroyed socialism
body:
Do you know how easy it is to awaken the next generation to the value of free market economics?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsjkgpeadc26qjccv7ocguq9p09u0bg0abnp1hhg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
Hello Friend,

Do you know how easy it is to awaken the next generation to the value of free market economics?

All you have to do is show them a pencil...

You might be wondering, _" How can something as simple as a pencil teach students about a subject as complicated as economics?"_

Let me show you how.

**The book "I, Pencil" by Foundation for Economic Education's Founder, Leonard E. Read, is a resource we use to educate Gen Z through our flagship FEE in the Classroom program.**
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb4bbcni7vd641aea73p6sh6dd7rg0ojotrogtno_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
This classic essay beautifully illustrates the marvelous interconnectivity of the marketplace, told from the viewpoint of a common pencil - _an item nearly everyone uses but no single person can make alone_.

**And this week, if you support the Foundation of Economic Education with $10 or more, I will send you a copy of"I, Pencil."**

Let me introduce myself. I am the President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), Lawrence Reed. My goal is to raise $50,000 to support FEE in the Classroom.

[I encourage you to read this book, Friend, so if you donate $10, $25, $50, or more, I will send your copy of "I, Pencil." _Click here to claim your copy_ _ >>>_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8eeviglpicpo280fnp6jicobfimrfar5u1n2kto_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)

**Your gift helps FEE build a future of freedom with the next generation through our programs like FEE in the Classroom.**

FEE in the Classroom counters radical socialist indoctrination by teaching young Americans the principles of individual liberty, limited government, and free-market economics.

FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors provide compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, Q&As, and educational materials, like "I, Pencil," in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country.

I'm proud to say that FEE taught over 55,000 students through FEE in the Classroom last year.

**FEE in the Classroom makes the ideas of liberty more familiar, credible, compelling, and engaging to students. **

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znf26v4hm7dgl79kpl23nhpb6t16hnn1s72o4khg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Your support helps FEE teach the principles of liberty and free markets to the next generation. Even a donation of $100, $50, $25, or just $10 has a HUGE impact. Click here to donate and get your copy of "I, Pencil" >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbbir3754da2ucndoebp11vrk0ticrtsn9e35sn8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
Over the last decade, FEE has become the global leader in reaching young people with the legal, economic, and ethical principles of a free society.

**In 2022 alone, more than 146 MILLION Gen Z interacted with FEE 's social media posts, videos, and online articles. **We gained nearly 70,000 followers across Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn. Our YouTube channels are growing in popularity. Our FEE Online and Common Sense Soapbox channels received more than 23 MILLION views.

Our digital content and in-person programs turn complex ideas into practical tools to help students learn how to live their best life and make the world a better place.

Can you help me reach my goal of raising $50,000 for FEE in the Classroom and **get your copy of "I, Pencil" this week** by clicking any link below?
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze1hv306kme3pcph096ik37udvcm55eg0h6gkbb8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate $25 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9jb61ri8bqbfnpr6fvjb5epfilhujsbri6qhed0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z686n633s6anbtnkvjhh625gs0cb5onu51lhdhs0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4abdpvv087v0k3b13ti115rctp4fui7r6bdsue8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zumpigepfbves6kg50a91rrtup029p6vcjdjo300_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrdsr4hl1d4qrhbdkd1mf410pjcf1vf5fqjhv27o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6t38s9evej16sds6s4lhainsth870qlq57j4hu8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3k5hclk255kq56c1mhk8i694sg555ihoi2p9s60_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)
I have a long history of using books to fight socialism.

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books (and raised money to support book smuggling) into Eastern European countries such as Poland and the Soviet Union itself.

I knew the risk to my life and freedom. But I also knew if the people there had any hope of freeing themselves from the shackles of socialism, they needed access to the ideas of liberty and free markets.

Now I want to use "I, Pencil" to keep that fight going by encouraging you to support FEE's mission.

[You can support FEE -- and receive a copy of the book, "I, Pencil" by Leonard E. Read -- by clicking here >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z063v7vqnnbm65e8kv10is90ekaqmommqusf9jeo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh2bs)

Thank you,

Lawrence Reed
President Emeritus

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._ /p>

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zsbu2qma8mmgg5in32spnc0mb418nhda1k2jbdpo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3gevspnqetmq5ggnog82mnr28l6jmeln9m9lfj8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c5hm0o72clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79119%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QF%2f2IEMi%2bjkLFNZDjlMpYQ&sysid=1)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79110%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MMH9VQYNMP%2bR8MfbK9R3Lw&sysid=1)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79111%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZwOGcCaLNWp1Ut9bO1SYRg&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79112%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XplZKnn%2fb0J1PZVxB%2bganw&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79113%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G77K72Df0aJ7SOGdW4WxPg&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79114%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DOwdTt%2bWwBG3di5TbFxpCg&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79125%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Pj8GutAhBTuNUUoFrc0Wg&sysid=1)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79126%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KZ9W06z18AGum2576NSlQg&sysid=1)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79127%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dEQ5u27nrZbLu7PvzsVEzQ&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79128%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Npw4tof%2fkwB4vAN%2fQcg4VQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 → **](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79129%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uP1nd1GPDZnc9UKj3%2fGNEg&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79120%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vcpgc6oKU%2fg0bQ2pKIyucA&sysid=1)

---

It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Great American Update 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f8980ffd564a5a91dd5be869ce2ad3&_e=j-Eg8kWPcLjUFl1d3I1__9GK1RU2AQ3P85uobYYkRpRsOrsjF_TzbZxN-2V52aSkyjT2a-lTD7Q0ovcHpVkgNrYZVa8wNhlpw4H4oKJYRvDPhMKWyN6tBNGQ-NRRhnO8-faQfunBXXYw8knO9qmR_rb04ngmMZA8YdxldIJTRRf4lqOd4P9YtjoXQq73m5IdESM3zyMKmxtrkuywODYCN4b6tJ_R154QHw5MC0UD_wIlRnG6BDi-vWjSAjI3LYs-he73cAugy7wb6SZXWcRGcOsLxWlJilysEetaFl6yFfhT7oP8GdWZshVeelXXu2nmCBxtXed1fnBXopY6-Qhn9jE3azPsfdNs4rcWu69k_aueOJXBwoYR-b4yFbFC7YlMOSs_6E43nKKQ5X1JlYnfmbMHfz4OMMhYPee-kQHJl9w%3D) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f8980ffd564a5a91dd5be869ce2ad3&_e=j-Eg8kWPcLjUFl1d3I1__9GK1RU2AQ3P85uobYYkRpRsOrsjF_TzbZxN-2V52aSkyjT2a-lTD7Q0ovcHpVkgNrYZVa8wNhlpw4H4oKJYRvDPhMKWyN6tBNGQ-NRRhnO8-faQfunBXXYw8knO9qmR_rb04ngmMZA8YdxldIJTRRf4lqOd4P9YtjoXQq73m5IdESM3zyMKmxtrkuywODYCN4b6tJ_R154QHw5MC0UD_wIlRnG6BDi-vWjSAjI3LYs-zgg29QMeOvzGIcnOGTxiWvViuzzQqxrd247fLnhEGuyQlk8xDTQ5_k8nF9w0_JGyFmS1Hkw-JRjOy_fmP8_JcsB_x_dr5MJwIWV0Wz1-34_GWMhTBUonhaaei4j-Q1naciLANPLdkHIEOudF-KRPnJyheQenwLjBqTIZ4fj_sGQ%3D) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f8980ffd564a5a91dd5be869ce2ad3&_e=j-Eg8kWPcLjUFl1d3I1__9GK1RU2AQ3P85uobYYkRpRsOrsjF_TzbZxN-2V52aSkyjT2a-lTD7Q0ovcHpVkgNrYZVa8wNhlpw4H4oKJYRvDPhMKWyN6tBNGQ-NRRhnO8-faQfunBXXYw8knO9qmR_rb04ngmMZA8YdxldIJTRRf4lqOd4P9YtjoXQq73m5IdESM3zyMKmxtrkuywODYCN4b6tJ_R154QHw5MC0UD_wIlRnG6BDi-vWjSAjI3LYs-NqQMHOrS6c80_pMGTq26mAfAgprUMb3_avPGy3nbIOUdlBHmZp_spLV8I0EUHvS6mNCai2QYuadrlV7DuiGMlBV5nt7s1DvuDupY26bMU2xhWzjgXCX0YV4edmhcMZMX21NW8jMN8AWCXQu1Zj0Z7OmuPKAAvK1mFvwUQ41cztg%3D) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents.
