I'll tell you. We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea. One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao. Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress. But we can't win without you. Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead. Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Full Mag News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1d39d59af28481a8110d3ef726ec8d4&_e=lRWfZqWrsV_XW1PyPsNkyqqBg6PQ6uxQTpO21SNq9twM_zgtZ7YgZkUNVjltcxQLUrKH_Vc9J5_esETzEulycctoD1WDrBcEjHe4p_c0vAltCoSY5atJgMpZmUJ8ZWruzYWGfCtHNEMHGf-TYPSxc08oXQytzb6aS8aUrAoELB0tVOMC4o6lJ1RlrJtLRdSLX9hwq5O12zZYB9U8MCEVMuy3VKqyv1SotKCEGUtZqoAknffiiPiQM6UlZC1BrPOndVGYlw0fvz6ul-glE2qfQi_2vFeE5lg9vtpt3hDKm2fdiiOJIHu5dXCeFa07wGLKxGpJRSVwOfC4aKVRoHSxhhOu5se4le1_CxhncGcbMaKF7tVrbnduNwC6f-4mPqVc6X8eMEmA_a-zqWsFmQIX1lPZury1fqwIEo4dQjFyRCk%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. body:

| |

Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3a1e4125494401a91479aed4bae287a&_e=H3RGmBeIV2ZjJUINHctIYCFKJyYIz1mO55XmFmT1nArfvIB81xrdWw_xiYtVLdD93hvip4Mm3rJfOKEuf6iVO0OTsQt_9hnL8V4wETMfPRzUGK3rQBiX4_MMVBMSWWbESXxxqtSkSPkk-y11DLWtGYS0tyjEUMMX-0m-wrYiqU3-yt7AJIN0p0Oe97UBR-VolcZQribB3JGUy68GW73ydwMMN81rRMGQ6j7oMhFKnym2cQ1Hv0nx9VQsT_VoeC24KbJL4Z9xjDrKtZv64VPv-T5aVaqR8ViwimDkv8PP-cSe1QvvhW9WgL5NtEK5oS9spD71yZFcrEmY2k-Z8IFDL2bjU23ezPLUv3PSHvQDCqyCVEt-MyBLDeKwYhDOpZwhV63EhQ28ZdAk7XVbSiootRa_6CU9XMAA3_uhQXtgWPg%3D)
That was our average donation last month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 3 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba976c048db34d8bb2261b5b905334f6&_e=1jayMdQw2mkVMQGFub4klsll25pe9wTD6CgYIUCw01v2O-vIzTIc8YsN2W9EPbFT-EGxSTPCWMrA6Z2qcKPE8vKo3WoerQ_wwvck1sAmYr3Valw9Cn-GxzP0i0VZWlGWx_hz1-1h3tyVkjTr_l0OBywrxO6IKznr4_RXOmHbFMn51BC9DCYDCkBFBZXsE1ByH3B_bBMMwriDYeNfoTP66p3yhW0T0yNMQhf32-tYh_SSILfIvAmBP2ChXd4JwAscGTteRRSzD7o7bDWeU9WGqap3njzd5g5Ea82Ti39WtwFeB7W-LmoKj5I5qkqfKByJIW-fEsTe3adqZYx9i_q8Dw4n8euB7Bjm2AYTTloqG5TP-E03DNQnT-yz35mQUItpUhsl4urZ9vq5dt3X29NuKsoEBhMVsrwCjueXFlHIvW8%3D) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba976c048db34d8bb2261b5b905334f6&_e=1jayMdQw2mkVMQGFub4klsll25pe9wTD6CgYIUCw01v2O-vIzTIc8YsN2W9EPbFT-EGxSTPCWMrA6Z2qcKPE8vKo3WoerQ_wwvck1sAmYr3Valw9Cn-GxzP0i0VZWlGWx_hz1-1h3tyVkjTr_l0OBywrxO6IKznr4_RXOmHbFMn51BC9DCYDCkBFBZXsE1ByH3B_bBMMwriDYeNfoTP66p3yhW0T0yNMQhf32-tYh_SSILfIvAmBP2ChXd4JwAscQdFQcb0Canwh42jAZJ0a-hW-97W89zmcgnrukc9I8XRED_sEUntaTmCdaSE6Xc2dM_02C3uI8776c1O4NIu4wL_gXZ-jsG9THS1Lvx0HkHYS9mkmPn9srSKO-rhtYygx3GWO3ujNeiGpFDrCYkNtxbUskgYnnpipQOyb3fuFbMU%3D) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba976c048db34d8bb2261b5b905334f6&_e=1jayMdQw2mkVMQGFub4klsll25pe9wTD6CgYIUCw01v2O-vIzTIc8YsN2W9EPbFT-EGxSTPCWMrA6Z2qcKPE8vKo3WoerQ_wwvck1sAmYr3Valw9Cn-GxzP0i0VZWlGWx_hz1-1h3tyVkjTr_l0OBywrxO6IKznr4_RXOmHbFMn51BC9DCYDCkBFBZXsE1ByH3B_bBMMwriDYeNfoTP66p3yhW0T0yNMQhf32-tYh_SSILfIvAmBP2ChXd4JwAscHFJFQYc7i42w8ydTVmM6YBH9FhpF6bM9UCvTTbrfgfl7wSzVuVuYcqN82nlAiJWa7lgiKC-OXUT61oH3AWNC1RN0zgznk-HHClthyQUW4pP4UwE0yCUBjcxvU7on_RffXzB4fKjLXxT0rWSJZNla1A3rONLYAemIt9hiAvFuvt4%3D) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|

You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Let me get you up to speed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
For too long, Democrats’ ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10043%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WpjN1p9NGHwSKgHI5zV2%2bw&sysid=1)
---

It’s Jim Jordan.

For too long, Democrats’ ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power to INTIMIDATE and SILENCE their political adversaries & everyday Americans.

_They SPY on our campaigns ...
They CENSOR our voices...
They HARASS concerned parents...
They TARGET America First patriots like YOU...
& they INDICTED President Trump!_

---
| | [DRAIN THE SWAMP](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10044%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N6z7LeTGWPt%2bRF8iT1fJwg&sysid=1)
---

Now: Democrats are FURIOUS.

Now that House Republicans are finally uncovering their corruption and working to DRAIN the Swamp, the Democrat money machine is working overtime to silence us yet again. They will do ANYTHING to stop us.

And if they succeed, our work will all be for nothing. They will get away with their schemes, and continue to weaponize the federal government against conservatives.
**So, I’m humbly asking: if you support our efforts to drain the swamp, please consider chipping in just $10 or $25 to make sure we can finish the job.**

Date: 05/07/2023 RE: Grassroots strategy on the ground Hi Peter, it’s Betsy, Nikki Haley’s campaign manager. First, I wanted to thank you for your support and let you know why you are receiving this memo. As one of Nikki Haley’s most trusted supporters, I want you to know what’s taking place on the campaign trail each week, gain a deeper knowledge of our grassroots infrastructure, and understand Team Haley’s strategy to build a winning campaign. After you finish reading this update, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b8fa39a335b57775f25fdde1a98144226017481560b51d10579fbee0e941ab1a9d024fcc9bc45db4cddc6d745c98a648cb please consider pitching in a donation to help us continue to build key infrastructure and get Nikki’s message out to every American. Let’s get started! CAMPAIGN STRATEGY UPDATE: Since Nikki launched her presidential campaign, she’s been traveling the country hosting as many town halls, rallies, and meet and greets with voters as possible. Nikki has made multiple swings through three states in particular: her home state of South Carolina, New Hampshire, and Iowa. Winning in these three states will play a KEY role in winning the primary. Here are a few hot stats: - Nikki has been all over the country, making 50 stops in just over 11 weeks. - Last week, Nikki barnstormed New Hampshire, with a total of 14 stops, including and 3 town halls — in just 3 days! - On Thursday, Nikki hosted a 600 person, standing-room-only, rally in Greer, South Carolina.Make no mistake, Nikki isn’t just flying in and flying out. At every single event, Nikki goes out of her way to answer questions, shake hands, and talk with every voter she can. Nikki’s putting in the hard work to reach every single voter and people are taking notice. Take a deeper look at the impact Nikki’s making on the ground:→ Op-ed: How to win Iowa ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b8e241386b4ef0d77a2b9ee028bf49aa50f9a9474c51c806517f1847a37fddd31827d5241435312028ef6e4835553e81aa Iowa Torch )→ Letter to the editor: Courage of Conviction ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b893c4272ee817fa06d7d403a27a49e40f566deeb325fcb7f622dcb5870e7a925a8036b087c80eac2114ff78efa69040be Bedford Gazette )→ Video recap: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b8d96d2cd3b9c36c20a1526e6ead66ccee2ef26303ef9349c5716b4b3eb5b4fb4b1a147f46bb96520a48bc1899b7ea3363 ICYMI watch our latest New Hampshire recap . UPDATE ON OUR GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT: We’re building the infrastructure from the ground up but assembling and sustaining an operation this size is no small task. We’re relying on grassroots donations to fund this real-time movement happening on the ground all across the country. That’s where you come in. Your investment in our grassroots infrastructure allows us to: - Identify and contact voters - Hold town halls, rallies, and other events - Build field teams and hire key staff https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b8fa39a335b57775f25fdde1a98144226017481560b51d10579fbee0e941ab1a9d024fcc9bc45db4cddc6d745c98a648cb CHIP IN TO HELP BUILD THIS CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE This is a key part in running a successful campaign and by building out strong operations on the ground, we can pave the way for victory. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b8fa39a335b57775f25fdde1a98144226017481560b51d10579fbee0e941ab1a9d024fcc9bc45db4cddc6d745c98a648cb I hope you will consider making a grassroots infrastructure investment today. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8ed7c1f69ce5f1b8fa39a335b57775f25fdde1a98144226017481560b51d10579fbee0e941ab1a9d024fcc9bc45db4cddc6d745c98a648cb CHIP IN TODAY Thank you in advance. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=844ca4fd511b42cf8570a361280e55ae&_e=anKJt1ZA_if215ILXzwqfCWL4kyWCU9eX37Kix4GIGbbDJP6I4eMesLXUP45rDs2Ydt_OLqiEDk5BmrUkb6Eb2ykKA0t3eSPEsDqaHhI7Npehm4kwZyrUm3V2SeS23du0LJZyojyvCmWDS_VrGIuVZYFsEvVblOIoq_jKwk88SRi2fGK66gk1G9ZU789uxzxRifg4cNf4aFhaq6IAGL2wjpEjFnERJvj8vuF6O7l7znPvELJ3NMAjpwe0x-NxJ1j48Tqd5prB_YHbi4yRxSUMfEJaQR1lAl-NMluMKuG6UdTFVL7gkce4m6RtbtevqZKU6bFT4pkYCORMU3qoVcCPbbGi7m7dKYd5uy0sXf7nGGSFMqBvy17UErj5vYEgW-HrY0X-iSdGBxsAhEyEXJ_TYU3Ik7ld-yZ7_JL7iaUPAc%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=844ca4fd511b42cf8570a361280e55ae&_e=anKJt1ZA_if215ILXzwqfCWL4kyWCU9eX37Kix4GIGbbDJP6I4eMesLXUP45rDs2Ydt_OLqiEDk5BmrUkb6Eb2ykKA0t3eSPEsDqaHhI7Npehm4kwZyrUm3V2SeS23du0LJZyojyvCmWDS_VrGIuVZYFsEvVblOIoq_jKwk88SRi2fGK66gk1G9ZU789uxzxRifg4cNf4aFhaq6IAGL2wjpEjFnERJvj8vuF6O7l7znPvELJ3NMAjpwe0x-NxJ1j48Tqd5prB_YHbi4yRxSUMWUJzaGSKfcRxeufwsoLQ2jp-FsHxO7MQafBE9nJEDd8GLZQndnb2Uzj7iZki-aT3TzQLkxQrV3c7Mck6KSa36Yb7li5_dv2rkxMQg6KSNf1pSWXlcz4J1afn9aThDNKWkaJjbPnq0BmoVUW2umGjts%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=844ca4fd511b42cf8570a361280e55ae&_e=anKJt1ZA_if215ILXzwqfCWL4kyWCU9eX37Kix4GIGbbDJP6I4eMesLXUP45rDs2Ydt_OLqiEDk5BmrUkb6Eb2ykKA0t3eSPEsDqaHhI7Npehm4kwZyrUm3V2SeS23du0LJZyojyvCmWDS_VrGIuVZYFsEvVblOIoq_jKwk88SRi2fGK66gk1G9ZU789uxzxRifg4cNf4aFhaq6IAGL2wjpEjFnERJvj8vuF6O7l7znPvELJ3NMAjpwe0x-NxJ1j48Tqd5prB_YHbi4yRxSUMUarvhW9GHbPIkxJshd-T5HWOjFp8Sd15Ja2oYhYXk-WEh-zNmdRGtp1HAtXxMHyJg__l_YUm616Q-A_4K1YkmBc0xIObwY9ZgfXjEsRjKPSFM1X4AbL5Ql47g0JYiUVDGtD-6oXttdKVZXQoXweJHA%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=844ca4fd511b42cf8570a361280e55ae&_e=anKJt1ZA_if215ILXzwqfCWL4kyWCU9eX37Kix4GIGbbDJP6I4eMesLXUP45rDs2Ydt_OLqiEDk5BmrUkb6Eb2ykKA0t3eSPEsDqaHhI7Npehm4kwZyrUm3V2SeS23du0LJZyojyvCmWDS_VrGIuVZYFsEvVblOIoq_jKwk88SRi2fGK66gk1G9ZU789uxzxRifg4cNf4aFhaq6IAGL2wjpEjFnERJvj8vuF6O7l7znPvELJ3NMAjpwe0x-NxJ1j48Tqd5prB_YHbi4yRxSUMQdP1siFy7sFpvrZZjqLt41ezgDp-JcjEuk_SVzJ-28DQpWSDDdT-LVlJmqbEeLLp5LymHiiAXwuY-MOCrvaamCTxeUyPwdxoKTMMsVfVBwzOcj3EnqUSYI2WCp-FpIphUnsUvM_ZLdy1rEg8Kqs3iw%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a190d8fd2a9c4e8888cdbbf45bbdfa57&_e=9lnQn7sX1zxjaB36dHbXOdbWZ7rOUTRPOSet-oORQG3sHOz6q_6caCH-FTtrpFsbndUwonKd5ZJKDg3iUCaZeEoq3VQcnCONKAf9kTmDFqq8zSSz6x3ZSeBVzAS9DhMEUVqD8jnw7a_j-G7Cjmh2Hkk6j9DTU_PhONkG1tqG2zMxHtU5yMNSDh5l0ZBUwxu8uPBD9dM2keuImhNMwTATRDfbOZGD9MMmOMw1FnTVDsR6QB30FpOupwMuAVjGfwL3ZfNZpJqyPF4C7AuLh6SQ36nMfltzxxyx44kfOuxt5O4l1pwUiy-Ugs2nBfKkN6h5) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a190d8fd2a9c4e8888cdbbf45bbdfa57&_e=9lnQn7sX1zxjaB36dHbXOdbWZ7rOUTRPOSet-oORQG3sHOz6q_6caCH-FTtrpFsbndUwonKd5ZJKDg3iUCaZeEoq3VQcnCONKAf9kTmDFqq8zSSz6x3ZSeBVzAS9DhMEUVqD8jnw7a_j-G7Cjmh2HuvEt-6g3y-SdH7BQZ-y1CEkGTv62D7Rsp9sn7R8lXrDN5tbIgt7nw-AN51Wt9iDtcfUUCUCZtXQ-uDjQrHn-skz6Llkcf2A5p1uBCld_yA6WDCoxg_VUIusOVHgweHWH3uMowW_skCWZbfC-xFWhOAvx4Bmb2RwkjOq2xbpK3mU) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a190d8fd2a9c4e8888cdbbf45bbdfa57&_e=9lnQn7sX1zxjaB36dHbXOdbWZ7rOUTRPOSet-oORQG3sHOz6q_6caCH-FTtrpFsbndUwonKd5ZJKDg3iUCaZeEoq3VQcnCONKAf9kTmDFqq8zSSz6x3ZSeBVzAS9DhMEUVqD8jnw7a_j-G7Cjmh2HmdgkgR03WVYuR5Lt8Xsw0Ish_VflwqipQ9sQYbZ6zMUDA2zoBWp-ErxmAWEOwetgeo991qRwd4SjDP1clUhLxCfAnejQdnmhP3m1NriTgtvgD_c6XAKkOyz0P2H43TTJ2q3t-q92LLZpsqOBoRkFVOMK7wJfZC7-3QtM0Jc5xQs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a190d8fd2a9c4e8888cdbbf45bbdfa57&_e=9lnQn7sX1zxjaB36dHbXOdbWZ7rOUTRPOSet-oORQG3sHOz6q_6caCH-FTtrpFsbndUwonKd5ZJKDg3iUCaZeEoq3VQcnCONKAf9kTmDFqq8zSSz6x3ZSeBVzAS9DhMEUVqD8jnw7a_j-G7Cjmh2HpvNrfHcj7NM3F2IR_ZgC4afPglXM7RmpxkYwLJHpeX2j4Qea1h3s6oeuivUwxE-HsYjKOzNpwtcOSpdW3InwNmjr9bZcc4P-rjatne6AwqyGFj7iKEfOYrgHop33672OcJ5K1xkvcCN4q1w5itvBe5B-APbADmAlX1MW2nAMyR1)

Did you see the news, friend? **After he fell only six percentage points short of winning the New York Governor's race last cycle, right-wing extremist Lee Zeldin just announced that he's "keeping an eye" on a run to defeat me here in New York.**
New York was the only state hit by a true red wave in 2022, and it helped flip the House majority for Kevin McCarthy. Now, it's clear that the GOP is targeting my seat to flip the Senate next.
In fact, MAGA Republicans just launched a brand-new "battleground fund" dedicated to winning even more _even more_ seats in New York for the GOP. And with our narrow Democratic Senate majority hanging on by a thread, the fact of the matter is that we have zero room for error.
That's why this is so concerning: **My team set a crucial $50,000 rapid-response goal to make sure we have enough resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're currently on track to fall short.**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. clean_body: | | | Did you see the news, friend? After he fell only six percentage points short of winning the New York Governor's race last cycle, right-wing extremist Lee Zeldin just announced that he's "keeping an eye" on a run to defeat me here in New York. New York was the only state hit by a true red wave in 2022, and it helped flip the House majority for Kevin McCarthy. Now, it's clear that the GOP is targeting my seat to flip the Senate next. In fact, MAGA Republicans just launched a brand-new "battleground fund" dedicated to winning even more even more seats in New York for the GOP. And with our narrow Democratic Senate majority hanging on by a thread, the fact of the matter is that we have zero room for error. That's why this is so concerning: My team set a crucial $50,000 rapid-response goal to make sure we have enough resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're currently on track to fall short. I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, which means I'm relying entirely on your grassroots support.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so grateful to have you by my side, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

---
|
---
**Virginia Beach Tornado Relief**
---
**_Attorney General Miyares is heartbroken for the Virginia Beach community after an EF-3 tornado hit earlier this week. _** **_Thank you to all of the first responders who worked tirelessly through the night ensuring the safety of all residents._**
---
|
---
On Monday, Attorney General Miyares toured some of the destruction and spoke with first responders, homeowners, and others impacted by this tragedy.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=979a3af7441ef5f90e0e8fe6ead0fbd4aca31acaeb3c1b69d9e1613f35115d1a4845134a273435c2869e563cf18bef3016c707a70168e569)
---
| **AG Miyares joined a bipartisan coalition with 25 other state attorneys general calling on the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) to provide full and unrestricted Medicare coverage for FDA-approved Alzheimer 's treatments, consistent with its decades-long practice of covering FDA-approved prescription drugs for Medicare beneficiaries.**** ** _" Alzheimer's is a devastating disease that impacts hundreds of thousands of Virginians. Patients, families, and caregivers who live in rural or underserved regions deserve the same treatment opportunities as those who live near or who can afford to travel to institutions administering potentially life-changing clinical trials." _ **- Attorney General Miyares **
---
| | [ Read the full letter](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=979a3af7441ef5f967e60ba396361f836d5e402f342d4c271b2edc9bc5f598bd4d9794173abe416c430edcc7375a6d80673cbcace224ecc6)
---
|
---
**Hermitage High School**
---
**_On Tuesday, AG Miyares welcomed Hermitage High School students to the Office of Attorney General. _**
---
|
---
|
---
Attorney General Miyares with Officer & Coach Virgil Burton, and Coach Michael Bailey. Bailey's Life Coach Academy and his team are doing a great job mentoring young people and promoting school safety in our Richmond schools.
---
|
---
|
---
| [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=979a3af7441ef5f9286c709afcdf2f628787f8c8c8424f71a4d6e6e4b4aee8314097e261fa8662b13857bd66ed2b1d0d9fca4108a6b96561)
---
| **AG Miyares joined 18 other attorneys general in sending a letter to JPMorgan Chase & Co. urging the company to stop discriminating against customers due to their religious beliefs or political affiliations. ** _" It's ridiculous to imagine a bank discriminating against customers for their personal religious or political beliefs, which clearly conflicts with JPMorgan Chase's hypocritical public image of inclusivity. No one should be denied service or treated differently because of what they believe or how they worship."_ **- Attorney General Miyares**
---
| | [Learn more](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=979a3af7441ef5f98c47aa4046cf9d058ea54922815c64c4e6a80c8c5556ab0efcb63aabb0cda58b5a5f14d1d8671daeb6d499c98b49bbbb)
---
| | [View the letter](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=979a3af7441ef5f98afce34c99151c7e90ebeb91e81117629127446b940b5a5940f3e468af1d66b556430969c1348f32654c903097843709)
---
|

|

---
| **_May is National Foster Care Month! _**
---
| | [Learn more about supporting foster care children](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=979a3af7441ef5f9930c733db25dd1044b7b825b4a39effb7e26466bc3738b15058649e452a34c92c842183664cf38b6a305ef3b70205321)
---
|
---
**Remembering the Victims of Communism**
---
|
---
|
---
| Last Sunday, Attorney General Miyares was a part of the 48th anniversary of the Fall of Saigon Ceremony in Falls Church with the Vietnamese-American community of DC, Maryland, and Virginia.
---
|
---
| **We must never forget the victims of Communism. **
---
| Until next time,
Jason Miyares

clean_body: See what the AG and Team have been doing this week in the Commonwealth! | | | | | | | | | | | | Virginia Beach Tornado Relief Attorney General Miyares is heartbroken for the Virginia Beach community after an EF-3 tornado hit earlier this week. Thank you to all of the first responders who worked tirelessly through the night ensuring the safety of all residents. | On Monday, Attorney General Miyares toured some of the destruction and spoke with first responders, homeowners, and others impacted by this tragedy. | | | | | | AG Miyares joined a bipartisan coalition with 25 other state attorneys general calling on the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) to provide full and unrestricted Medicare coverage for FDA-approved Alzheimer 's treatments, consistent with its decades-long practice of covering FDA-approved prescription drugs for Medicare beneficiaries. " Alzheimer's is a devastating disease that impacts hundreds of thousands of Virginians. Patients, families, and caregivers who live in rural or underserved regions deserve the same treatment opportunities as those who live near or who can afford to travel to institutions administering potentially life-changing clinical trials." - Attorney General Miyares | | | Hermitage High School On Tuesday, AG Miyares welcomed Hermitage High School students to the Office of Attorney General. | | Attorney General Miyares with Officer & Coach Virgil Burton, and Coach Michael Bailey. Bailey's Life Coach Academy and his team are doing a great job mentoring young people and promoting school safety in our Richmond schools. | | | | AG Miyares joined 18 other attorneys general in sending a letter to JPMorgan Chase & Co. urging the company to stop discriminating against customers due to their religious beliefs or political affiliations. " It's ridiculous to imagine a bank discriminating against customers for their personal religious or political beliefs, which clearly conflicts with JPMorgan Chase's hypocritical public image of inclusivity. No one should be denied service or treated differently because of what they believe or how they worship." - Attorney General Miyares | | | | | | | | May is National Foster Care Month! | | | Remembering the Victims of Communism | | | Last Sunday, Attorney General Miyares was a part of the 48th anniversary of the Fall of Saigon Ceremony in Falls Church with the Vietnamese-American community of DC, Maryland, and Virginia. | | We must never forget the victims of Communism. | Until next time, Jason Miyares | | | | "JasonMiyares.com" | | DONATE TODAY TO FUEL JASON'S FIGHT TO PROTECT THE COMMONWEALTH! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Shell plastics leading to ocean destruction
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760117?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Junkyard plastic piles are growing HIGHER and HIGHER, but greedy Shell keeps pumping out more plastic and endangering communities.****[Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760118?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** It’s not just junkyards. A garbage truck’s worth of plastic waste enters our oceans _**EVERY MINUTE**_ , causing more than **_1 MILLION_** marine animals to die every year. Sea turtles choking on plastic bags, fish bellies bursting with plastic pellets -- and **it gets worse every moment we don’t take action.** But an impending _**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE**_ doesn’t deter Shell from polluting communities to make even more plastic waste. Its new petrochemical plant in Beaver County produces plastics, toxic emissions, and poisonous fumes that contaminate community air, water, and soil. In just a few months of operation, **Shell has violated state air pollution regulations several times.** Who knows how many more violations might come without immediate action. **[Friend, stand up to Shell’s greed and help STOP its reckless pollution in Beaver County by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760119?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760120?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The plastic the Shell plant produces will likely break down into microplastics that pollute the _**water we drink, the food we eat, and even the air we breathe!**_ In fact, **the average person consumes a credit card’s worth of plastic EVERY WEEK!** In addition to plastics in their air and water, Beaver County residents have to worry about chemical pollution thanks to Shell.
Shell executives are lining their own pockets at the expense of communities and the environment. **_YOUR ACTION can help us fight back!_ [We need 5,762 more people to help HOLD SHELL ACCOUNTABLE for its pollution and plastic waste! Please, Friend, sign by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760121?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760120?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f56b6eab2cdd4d208e3202816deb4fe9&_e=Xnp5_rybkBs367VG7W_GZvFV-1jyX9yi33db-eIoJ-vuV5QdiQ_biz0XCkBqrqbpoX83wmxeJAxYDUf5ge9Ig4Nv5d6IDSU-mwoN_YbThedudOs69V31LyZDiRPzBzCYIsdYF_eMIm7V9BE-AOf0VYS2OAhvbVHfujAE65MSJHRG2MHsJfI_kfr3Tsd8R0Cjx-1IkBIhkmMCu2mXCSMOU55esPcyeSkOrIksIBX8Su0JmLGE1h0nuFnJKQFygYpAF4UtOfQ--h-_pWCBud3NqtnB9Ms6yi17tHT9Q8jRx1eNVk12hPhCXJ7SDQPoDu-5RpJitNLbb3R0NgaE40xmpvxFsAsDAg90FCcmp-OzyehLZgs4Evd7-L0TAHNxlioypbatxnWIKpSI7dijrj8QUw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f56b6eab2cdd4d208e3202816deb4fe9&_e=Xnp5_rybkBs367VG7W_GZvFV-1jyX9yi33db-eIoJ-vuV5QdiQ_biz0XCkBqrqbpoX83wmxeJAxYDUf5ge9Ig4Nv5d6IDSU-mwoN_YbThedudOs69V31LyZDiRPzBzCYIsdYF_eMIm7V9BE-AOf0VYS2OAhvbVHfujAE65MSJHRG2MHsJfI_kfr3Tsd8R0Cjx-1IkBIhkmMCu2mXCSMOU55esPcyeSkOrIksIBX8Su0JmLGE1h0nuFnJKQFygYpAzAMC2MDOvdmHJYJBPy1j5fFzPrUcyTeIz8oo77Ky8u8xAU3wZwolnU0j3gpZhcILQzdgNciaL2htT1VH3W5MIx25uJrqyBCClELmqGfY7JlMHisoRvS7mw968ZHRHRuqjhPmPQcHb2rFWBFHM3Y-Tg%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f56b6eab2cdd4d208e3202816deb4fe9&_e=Xnp5_rybkBs367VG7W_GZvFV-1jyX9yi33db-eIoJ-vuV5QdiQ_biz0XCkBqrqbpoX83wmxeJAxYDUf5ge9Ig4Nv5d6IDSU-mwoN_YbThedudOs69V31LyZDiRPzBzCYIsdYF_eMIm7V9BE-AOf0VYS2OAhvbVHfujAE65MSJHRG2MHsJfI_kfr3Tsd8R0Cjx-1IkBIhkmMCu2mXCSMOU55esPcyeSkOrIksIBX8Su0JmLGE1h0nuFnJKQFygYpAJ40DKhog1O6DohtvGzvZqEyCngY5kOXsKXR-BRqTfRlCTnt_hkQiGWdHus_a08bLeT1wawadLU2xCE0zMTKNlEAYWa3te3jvEi6WM_sXELMEoj-e4gu0qikkRxbCPpzYbycVrZ3F6EjJ2j473-7rJQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f56b6eab2cdd4d208e3202816deb4fe9&_e=Xnp5_rybkBs367VG7W_GZvFV-1jyX9yi33db-eIoJ-vuV5QdiQ_biz0XCkBqrqbpoX83wmxeJAxYDUf5ge9Ig4Nv5d6IDSU-mwoN_YbThedudOs69V31LyZDiRPzBzCYIsdYF_eMIm7V9BE-AOf0VYS2OAhvbVHfujAE65MSJHRG2MHsJfI_kfr3Tsd8R0Cjx-1IkBIhkmMCu2mXCSMOU55esPcyeSkOrIksIBX8Su0JmLGE1h0nuFnJKQFygYpAdle08PG9A2gUPeFiO_XxzfjM3h7yiqLUQ9X3eo0AFhCuxknpDcBiSEvcb2tlLjdSpeEWLG4Tg7ExR6tekL_VlGwi-GbGgjIGYwsqhEt9NdrwaErudL2dE8L9kLglB7DwiwbAqslDoA218cVWhnJ0OQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f56b6eab2cdd4d208e3202816deb4fe9&_e=Xnp5_rybkBs367VG7W_GZvFV-1jyX9yi33db-eIoJ-vuV5QdiQ_biz0XCkBqrqbpoX83wmxeJAxYDUf5ge9Ig4Nv5d6IDSU-mwoN_YbThedudOs69V31LyZDiRPzBzCYIsdYF_eMIm7V9BE-AOf0VYS2OAhvbVHfujAE65MSJHRG2MHsJfI_kfr3Tsd8R0Cjx-1IkBIhkmMCu2mXCSMOU55esPcyeSkOrIksIBX8Su0JmLGE1h0nuFnJKQFygYpAmvnrugfgzBCJgtaGCORY0Z4lpV_hgr14yQB-M8Bqql_3qlvqmoRp5JurIM5YlF29UZCLlkUu53W_9c8IYa3hiScfQDY-SXf-k_e4OCHsi0CqN_heJ9qnHIeoRzAx06LHYTsMjbWTECUbd-ThzAMmcQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f56b6eab2cdd4d208e3202816deb4fe9&_t=hK2JXjgtxezv0WYvTHTha3FBlB7J__lOVmE8MObNZjUCje_pAlEhpTaDh_NYesEsO8KpliEIri9VHY0u_yswpGLrVOvyqinS7li_aNWnGbOKmaqHcLJsVRJJSOcQ5cPDuq7nOp5OGxL_5_kxbf1RIH3qf1_nmV0TMIGNqt0rnYk%3D)

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Is the Constitution “trash?!”
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTQ7h7DEN

You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are making outrageous statements like "The Constitution
is kind of trash."

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTQ7h7DEN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

"The
Constitution is kind of trash."

That's
what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a
highly-rated daytime talk show.

You've
likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of
limited government and personal liberty with outrageous
statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash."

And like
that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative
that our Constitution is flawed, outdated, and incapable of
dealing with the challenges of our time.

Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander
Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect
guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist
Papers.

Written
between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius,
The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper
editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas
Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the
principles of government which ever was written."

And these
documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If
we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we
shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them.

That's
why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The
Federalist Papers," on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible
donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

"The
Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for
viewing in your home or a small group.

You might
also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal
study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen
your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even
more.

These
DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our
nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family
member.

But
supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of
"The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people
have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last
long.

You can
use this secure link to receive your copy of "The Federalist
Papers" right now:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61771930:WTQ7h7DEN:m:3:2532013465:428BD8EE5A615B4DBE1FF1700074D2FD:r

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

---
Dear Friend, **I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.**

**I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.**

But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. **Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day.** I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTI3LTBmOTUyYTUwYjY5MzQwOTU4ZjZiNjE2YzBmY2ZjOTkyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPMzg2OTQifQ/4bG2JBpV5SLT5wHn2nKqQw)
---
**Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism.**** ** This is one mission that our country desperately needs.
---
---
**Larry Kudlow** Columnist for The New York Sun
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTI3LTBmOTUyYTUwYjY5MzQwOTU4ZjZiNjE2YzBmY2ZjOTkyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPMzg2OTQifQ/gLI2Q_ZW7TLkuzX2SjlIDg)

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Inslee's Retirement
body:
Governor Jay Inslee is sparing Washingtonians the possibility of another disastrous term under his care. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778133:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Governor Jay Inslee is sparing Washingtonians the possibility of another disastrous term under his care. Thankfully last week he announced he will not seek re-election. You can take that off worry list while, as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview** Snohomish County Sheriff Adam Fortney joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. He shared his thoughts on the failure of the Democrat-controlled legislature to fix the serious public safety problems they created with activist-inspired laws passed in 2021. Sheriff Fortney also criticized Olympia lawmakers for failing to pass a strict drug possession law. And he explained his innovative "Lead The Way" program which seeks to steer teenagers away from a criminal pathway. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778134:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r)**.** ** ** **This week 's top story...** Washington Governor Jay Inslee set capitalists cheering on May Day with his announcement not to seek re-election in 2024 - though it's a day usually reserved for celebrations by socialists everywhere. That means voters will decide whether the next torch-bearer for our state will be as hyper-partisan as the outgoing burn-it-all-down Inslee or whether some balance will be returned to the state's capital. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778135:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r)**. ** **In case you missed it ...** Washington State Attorney General Bob Ferguson (aka "[Bobbie Sue](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778136:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r)" according to one attorney who knows him) is rushing to take advantage of Governor Jay Inslee's not-unexpected retirement announcement by launching an "exploratory" committee. The problem is that's not legal in our state. As the Attorney General, one would expect him to know something about campaign finance laws, especially since he has been running campaigns for the last 20 years. Unfortunately for us all, Ferguson - and his entire campaign - is really that incompetent. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778137:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r)**.

** **Your inspiration for the week ...** The 2023 Legislative session is officially over - and so has tulip visiting in Mt. Vernon. Please enjoy former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler's photo of tulips in our beautiful state. P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778138:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r).
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61778139:sDvvD7DpN:m:1:2610672541:DBF998D1D95FECE2350765A89DBD56AD:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14195312&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osDvvD7DpN).
---

name: Andy Kim
subject: 5 things wrong with House Republicans’ budget (and one thing you can do)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62924550/405007511/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDViYThmOC1kNWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5yb5WrGvI740mpnPGFdVqvaVwilu2pMYjYyFttoL6Js=&emci=e49f0c14-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=845ba8f8-d5ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Last month, House Republicans passed a bill that they called "a solution" to raise the looming debt ceiling crisis. **It's no solution. Their bill proposes massive cuts to critical programs that millions of Americans rely on.** What Congressional Republicans are pitching as a solution does more harm and nothing good. **[But first, we're building up our movement to put an end to this sort of economic hostage-taking, and we need YOU. Will you join us today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62924551/405007512/-821065315?refcode=2023-05-07-5thingswrong&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=845ba8f8-d5ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDViYThmOC1kNWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5yb5WrGvI740mpnPGFdVqvaVwilu2pMYjYyFttoL6Js=)** Here are five things wrong with Congressional Republicans' budget and one thing you can do.
1. **Homeless veterans will lose job training**. A 22 percent cut to Veterans Affairs would mean that thousands of veterans who are experiencing or at risk of homelessness would be denied job training, counseling, and job readiness services.
2. **People will lose access to health insurance**. Medicaid enrollment has doubled in size since 2007. Republicans are attempting to disqualify as many people as possible by requiring an ineffective, onerous work requirement. As many as 2 million people could lose access to their Medicaid coverage.
3. **Seniors will go hungry.** Republicans are proposing raising the minimum age for the essential Meals on Wheels program. As a result, an estimated one million home-bound seniors would be disqualified from this decades-old program.
4. **Children and teens will lose teachers**. With cuts to low-income schools, the Republican budget would lay off 60,000 teachers, harming 26 million of our most vulnerable students.
5. **Americans will be evicted.** House Republicans' proposed cuts to the Department of Housing and Urban Development would deny hundreds of thousands of Americans access to rental assistance, create an unprecedented loss of affordable housing, and trigger a wave of mass evictions.

Burdening our most vulnerable communities with more suffering doesn't qualify as "a solution" to _anything._ I voted against this inhumane proposal and will oppose any attempt to cut the critical services our communities count on. **Here's my ask for you:** **[Help keep our democracy strong by checking your voter registration status](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62924552/405007513/2086807124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDViYThmOC1kNWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5yb5WrGvI740mpnPGFdVqvaVwilu2pMYjYyFttoL6Js=&emci=e49f0c14-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=845ba8f8-d5ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)** and making sure you are ready to make a difference. Every voice matters, and together we can take a stand against cruelty and injustice. [check voter registration](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62924553/405007514/2086807124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDViYThmOC1kNWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5yb5WrGvI740mpnPGFdVqvaVwilu2pMYjYyFttoL6Js=&emci=e49f0c14-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=845ba8f8-d5ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) As always, I'm honored to be in this movement with you. subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=787a6c68df244b6f9cdc615e5835e095&_e=SbyB-DwxwwA5OjBrSzZNfKyImfu69S6Q9AJkBGgKa_AF64sgPO4rlZ_YZdA_nru6ktfdFsrbwL8_sqDj51XGoIS3UKmRm_T0nYwm74p-3Clv-pJ3wKZ0Y4XOwrY9Ucs2uTiUiKn4F7utMO1UV7JFQYI-ejYo6wdPt01PNiKKVD20cDrs7Dxjel6lk3daHvRRS3ZZguBZR1iULtC9wPxAL59X1OfmmQ_YPQribB6AxV4HNv1JvPV7xcI2iI4ebLByIyX82EBJAIrzEPsxWCcjc5y3KwvIlM8q6k2uztizTHXzNIR0Y9Vjq_gkxbZ11QvZwOwTvswNY9VS9NXIS00bEb1-PL-jmJEXngrKTYIpnCjZM-VdKC1KzvK9btX693S-kVauLVs2ile846gA7C_FZn_V9nfcBLsaZYAOszV7Heks0M034Ad9Nz2ymDAE-OyE)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=787a6c68df244b6f9cdc615e5835e095&_e=SbyB-DwxwwA5OjBrSzZNfKyImfu69S6Q9AJkBGgKa_AF64sgPO4rlZ_YZdA_nru6ktfdFsrbwL8_sqDj51XGoIS3UKmRm_T0nYwm74p-3Clv-pJ3wKZ0Y4XOwrY9Ucs2uTiUiKn4F7utMO1UV7JFQYI-ejYo6wdPt01PNiKKVD20cDrs7Dxjel6lk3daHvRRS3ZZguBZR1iULtC9wPxAL59X1OfmmQ_YPQribB6AxV4HNv1JvPV7xcI2iI4ebLByIyX82EBJAIrzEPsxWCcjc81Dnz_4OORP5N9NmLmTqgZM75vmU-CA_yrE4u28gDQ2i3pSePFkkuDLXd-IQV_OB-d-4C2_v2uUy14gDO8fh3vkynsieMX8OMVI4Jw8pTjz0butetwA9oN9MjP248vejdyPZ6JqZ54RgMku-hc7kxqK70ts3mEaAf-mUsN_nf4j)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=787a6c68df244b6f9cdc615e5835e095&_e=SbyB-DwxwwA5OjBrSzZNfKyImfu69S6Q9AJkBGgKa_AF64sgPO4rlZ_YZdA_nru6ktfdFsrbwL8_sqDj51XGoIS3UKmRm_T0nYwm74p-3Clv-pJ3wKZ0Y4XOwrY9Ucs2uTiUiKn4F7utMO1UV7JFQYI-ejYo6wdPt01PNiKKVD20cDrs7Dxjel6lk3daHvRRS3ZZguBZR1iULtC9wPxAL59X1OfmmQ_YPQribB6AxV4HNv1JvPV7xcI2iI4ebLByIyX82EBJAIrzEPsxWCcjc2kjesmCoTMkYpq4mbi7COBBpY0ZpUUa03FnqNwh92vf3wh52B0J93MJmhDjkOb4t8mY-UITsae5ii0hEuUMUMqrdieHo_GUXpiEm5HOHzOMMHcX45mfYDqWM86OlAMxhpsFY3jToGNuKdjsKoOBMSdisNG98W7N_5dVnNolcy47)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: My conversation with a Trump supporter.
body:
Good morning, Peter. ☕

In my last election, I had more conversations than I can count with folks across IL-17. One _especially_ memorable chat happened just after we launched when I was knocking doors for signatures to get my name on the ballot.

It was one of my neighbors a few streets down who turned out to be a staunch, Trump-supporting Republican. If any of my staff were with me, they probably would have had me turn tail. Instead, I made it a point to listen. And I was happy to find he was willing to return the favor.

We obviously didn’t agree on everything, but when it came to the issues facing our district, we found a lot of common ground. In the end, he ended up placing one of my signs in his yard! _Never mind that it would eventually end up a few feet from his Trump one..._ 😳

**If you only watch cable news, you might be tricked into thinking politics is all chaos and noise. The truth is, when you meet folks face to face, you’ll find you have a lot more in common than you think.** That’s why I’m so big on door-to-door canvassing and meeting directly with voters. Without the distractions, productive conversations are possible!

To win in a tough district like mine, we can’t leave any stone unturned. That means not writing off anyone – especially given that I represent everyone's interests in Congress. We’ll need to find as many new supporters as we can, and a big piece of doing that means having the grassroots funding to make it happen.

**[With a new opponent now in the race, I’m not leaving anything up to chance. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $3 (or whatever you can) to my re-election campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62933138/405026806/-665437442?refcode=em-5.7.23.all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjZjM2E4OC1kZWVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dMwKtSTh9Kl0PAqaIhhps_IaUXPQRFxViWgX5kUZrlQ=)**

Your support powers this campaign.

Thanks, I hope you enjoy your Sunday.

Eric

\--

clean_body: Good morning, Peter. ☕ In my last election, I had more conversations than I can count with folks across IL-17. One especially memorable chat happened just after we launched when I was knocking doors for signatures to get my name on the ballot. It was one of my neighbors a few streets down who turned out to be a staunch, Trump-supporting Republican. If any of my staff were with me, they probably would have had me turn tail. Instead, I made it a point to listen. And I was happy to find he was willing to return the favor. We obviously didn’t agree on everything, but when it came to the issues facing our district, we found a lot of common ground. In the end, he ended up placing one of my signs in his yard! Never mind that it would eventually end up a few feet from his Trump one... 😳 If you only watch cable news, you might be tricked into thinking politics is all chaos and noise. The truth is, when you meet folks face to face, you’ll find you have a lot more in common than you think. That’s why I’m so big on door-to-door canvassing and meeting directly with voters. Without the distractions, productive conversations are possible! To win in a tough district like mine, we can’t leave any stone unturned. That means not writing off anyone – especially given that I represent everyone's interests in Congress. We’ll need to find as many new supporters as we can, and a big piece of doing that means having the grassroots funding to make it happen. = Your support powers this campaign. Thanks, I hope you enjoy your Sunday. Eric \-- Meteorologist | Member of Congress (IL-17) 309-306-1717 = | * Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States We'd hate to see you got, but you can use this link to:

body:

Friend, time is running out before my midnight fundraising deadline – so before I ask you to help us reach our crucial $25,000 goal, I need to explain why this is so important.
**Experts from CNN to FiveThirtyEight say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and that Senate control could all come down to what happens here in Ohio.** We have the power to win this race, but not without overwhelming grassroots support from folks like you.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend:
friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $2,500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

| George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__Butwe couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44751?t=6&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44751?t=7&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44752?t=8&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44751?t=9&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44751?t=10&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44751?t=11&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44751?t=12&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri)
---
***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7549%2E878179%2EX8ZKri).**

subject: Re: [sign now] Stop criminalizing dissent!

body:
Support activists and our right to protest. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTviq3PFkZQD2yBPSZyYXEPUE85DFV5FgFL2ufseH8dxWSbyIWV6njOM1cfirxgamd6rbkqZwnndO7DoSYrsGBdKc53KE-M_UvdfeDgdvZo4DkS9rig31hvQqNXSfqQRX7McFQDf1FPPEcddPOjdZRvaPCCK6BQhouuOMqFCpr6zkQ/3vz/2uZ2gCgjRV-ofmtz3Cyk2g/h0/rtJB0jjlINkrBvthWL6zNnLTYrtp8ZokePT_GTj62MA)
---
Friend, We’re witnessing frightening examples of a national trend to militarize police and to silence dissent. In Georgia, police shot and killed an activist known as Tortuguita with at least 57 bullets. Tortuguita was sitting in an Atlanta forest to protest the building of “Cop City,” a new training center for militarized police. **The officers involved in this brutal murder have not been charged. However, in an outrageous attempt to silence our constitutionally-protected right to dissent, Georgia officials have charged Cop City protesters with domestic terrorism.** If found guilty, the activists could face up to 35 years in prison—for such “crimes” as having mud on their shoes, sleeping in a forest, and “standing next to signs for anarchy.”1 And many are being held in prison without bail.
