body:
Will you share your input please?
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62940541/405049554/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1199-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyODBkNGVlLWU5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CuqTMCKRIEPI2DZuMuNsIDFMCGj3fyGJ18bt3JUyqvw=&emci=a4169bef-cae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0280d4ee-e9ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

We need your input, Peter.
Now that we're a third of the way through 2023, we're also a third of the way into this year's fight to transform politics – and we need your help.

Here at Emerge, 2022 was _huge_ : Our alums had a 71 percent win rate in elections nationwide, and 97 percent of incumbents who ran for reelection won! But the work continues in 2023: We're taking every opportunity to empower Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level.
**That’s why we’re asking our top supporters to take the Emerge Community Survey today. ****Right now, we’re still 51 responses short of our goal, and we’re counting on your feedback before our survey closes at midnight. [So please: Will you take just two minutes to share your input now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62940542/405049555/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1199-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyODBkNGVlLWU5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CuqTMCKRIEPI2DZuMuNsIDFMCGj3fyGJ18bt3JUyqvw=&emci=a4169bef-cae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0280d4ee-e9ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62940543/405049556/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1199-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyODBkNGVlLWU5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CuqTMCKRIEPI2DZuMuNsIDFMCGj3fyGJ18bt3JUyqvw=&emci=a4169bef-cae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0280d4ee-e9ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

Listening to real people and real communities – not out-of-touch “experts” – is how Emerge forms our strategies, designs our trainings, and recruits the right candidates for the right races year after year.
**With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first.[So please, will you take our Emerge Community Survey now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62940544/405049557/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1199-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyODBkNGVlLWU5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CuqTMCKRIEPI2DZuMuNsIDFMCGj3fyGJ18bt3JUyqvw=&emci=a4169bef-cae9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0280d4ee-e9ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses.
– Team Emerge
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62940545/405049558/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1199-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyODBkNGVlLWU5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CuqTMCKRIEPI2DZuMuNsIDFMCGj3fyGJ18bt3JUyqvw=)

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62940546/405049559/-1657939538?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1199-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyODBkNGVlLWU5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CuqTMCKRIEPI2DZuMuNsIDFMCGj3fyGJ18bt3JUyqvw=)**
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: What happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics like Silicon Valley Bank, don't recognize state lines. With PA the fifth most populous state, bordering big states such as New York, New Jersey & Ohio, what happens there will help or harm a large percentage of Americans.
body:
9 days to decide Pennsylvania’s fate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3daa511-76e2-4852-93ff-35491f72ec29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[In a little more than a week 13 million Americans may be in serious danger, and we can stop it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5bdbf1b-fa7c-4b4f-a77a-9e2eafd79ba4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _Some of our biggest midterm victories were in Pennsylvania. Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro. Senator John Fetterman._ **_We even, unexpectedly, took back the state house by a 101-100 margin, _****_creating opportunities to make the lives of 13 million Pennsylvanians better._** **_Yet, what happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics like Silicon Valley Bank, don't recognize state lines. _****_With PA the fifth most populous state, bordering big states such as New York, New Jersey & Ohio, what happens there will help or harm a large percentage of Americans._** [_**That's why, with special elections for two open state house seats in PA on May 16th--ONLY 9 DAYS AWAY--we absolutely can't let Repubicans win.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0218b81-8b00-49f6-8a90-45d9244bef44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Remember that 101-100 margin? If the GOP takes both seats they'll have a 102-101 margin, we'll lose the state house and with it any ability to pass good policy on abortion rights, voting, gun safety, climate, LGBTQ rights and much more. It'd be a disaster. A direct attack on our liberty.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6452ce58-3eb0-4bfd-8710-bfad44685439/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrat Heather Boyd's been clear that "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is THE reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn's said he'll block permitless carry of guns to protect our children. Both of their GOP opponents will give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. They'll join efforts to attack our democracy._ [**_We can't let this happen, or millions of children, women, Americans in general, will suffer. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to expand our rights, instead of letting MAGA Republicans force policies on us that nearly ended our republic?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taef3e5d0-e1e1-4b04-9ba2-f9305561a48c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff
---

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b75f004-70b0-4fd5-b8ee-f5917ae44bd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Team Pramila
subject: Sign the petition: Support the We The People Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country.
#
**Peter, it’s time to get dark money out of our elections.**
Since the Supreme Court ruling in _Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission_ , we’ve seen the influence of political spending and dark money increase drastically in our elections.
**That’s why Pramila introduced the We The People Amendment to finally kneecap corporate political spending.** By stipulating that the First Amendment applies only to “natural persons” rather than corporations, this amendment would effectively reverse the U.S. Supreme Court’s final ruling in 2010.
Peter, if we want to make sure our upcoming elections are free of dark money and accurately represent the voice of the people, **we need to overturn _Citizens United_ and support the We The People Amendment.** **[Add your name today to build momentum and power for our fight to end the influence of dark money in our elections.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230507-2455&t=1&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230507-2455&t=2&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)**
**Corporations are not people, and money is not speech****, Peter.** And in every cycle since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision, we’ve seen more and more special interests pour dark money into campaigns across the country. This has to stop.
Through television, radio, and digital ads, interest groups have been able to spend an unruly amount of money to influence our elections. An estimated $8.9 billion dollars was spent during the 2022 midterms making it the most expensive Congressional election cycle. And Super PACs have infiltrated our politics to disregard campaign finance laws and ethics.
We can no longer ignore the immense growth of corporate power and corrupt political influence from the endless sums of dark money in our elections. **And as a champion of the people, Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country.**
Pramila is committed to breaking down the pillars of injustice that have upheld our government for far too long. And the We The People Amendment is the systemic and tangible solution that matches the urgency of this moment.
[**Sign on to our petition today to support Pramila as she fights for us in Congress and finally end the predatory influence of dark money in our elections.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230507-2455&t=3&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230507-2455&t=4&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230507-2455-footer&t=5&refcode2=2455_420207_lhJvBM&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2455%2E420207%2ElhJvBM)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Before she was elected to the Arizona Legislature, Raquel Terán worked as an organizer for over a decade. She spent her days knocking on doors, meeting with people one-on-one, hearing their stories and, most importantly, listening to their concerns.

name: Democratic Party of Georgia
subject: Surging MAGA extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
and what you can do about it

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62941843/405054840/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRlMGU4MS1mMGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU1nXq1ydzJqQkrqEkFqxwUA-BvY-fXbl6zHwbpb4jI=&emci=21e1c6f3-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=35de0e81-f0ec-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

We’re going to be straight with you–MAGA extremism is surging in Georgia and across the nation.

In Georgia, the newest wave of MAGA extremism kicked off with Marjorie Taylor Greene, whose evil and baseless wacky conspiracy theories put us in danger every single day. She’s accused the Bidens of sex trafficking, sowed distrust in COVID vaccines, rambled about Jewish space lasers, and more. Despite her conspiracy theory rants, she’s surging in power and may even be a _**VP pick for Donald Trump!**_

Her MAGA infection spread across the country like wildfire. People like Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, Paul Gosar, and more are dragging the GOP House Majority so far to the right that it’s now unrecognizable to traditional conservatives. Their extremism has completely taken over, and now, MTG is the true power behind Kevin McCarthy.

Possibly worst of all, they’re boosting ultra-MAGA presidential candidates like Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. **If they set foot in the White House, it could be the end of democracy as we know it!**

You might be asking– _what can I do about all this?_ The answer is quite simple.

**There’s only one way to stop them, and that is to absolutely demolish them at the ballot box in 2024. We need to send a clear message that their hateful and radical ideology have no place in America and that we, the people, strongly reject it!**

And if we are going to win in 2024, that starts with Georgia. Georgia was the closest state in 2020–President Biden won it by only 0.23%!–and it will be the most important battleground next year for keeping the White House and defeating the MAGA extremism led by Georgia’s Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[**_So, we are graciously, humbly asking if you will chip in using the link below to help us build up our critical organizing infrastructure to keep Georgia blue in 2024. Georgia can be the place where we finally defeat MAGA, remove MTG from power, and show that GOP extremism will always be fiercely rejected by the American people!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62941844/405054841/161621612?refcode=20230507.1_DPG_5M&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRlMGU4MS1mMGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU1nXq1ydzJqQkrqEkFqxwUA-BvY-fXbl6zHwbpb4jI=) | [PITCH IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62941845/405054842/-1313339816?refcode=20230507.1_DPG_5M&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRlMGU4MS1mMGVjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU1nXq1ydzJqQkrqEkFqxwUA-BvY-fXbl6zHwbpb4jI=)

clean_body: and what you can do about it | | | Peter, We’re going to be straight with you–MAGA extremism is surging in Georgia and across the nation. In Georgia, the newest wave of MAGA extremism kicked off with Marjorie Taylor Greene, whose evil and baseless wacky conspiracy theories put us in danger every single day. She’s accused the Bidens of sex trafficking, sowed distrust in COVID vaccines, rambled about Jewish space lasers, and more. Despite her conspiracy theory rants, she’s surging in power and may even be a VP pick for Donald Trump! Her MAGA infection spread across the country like wildfire. People like Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, Paul Gosar, and more are dragging the GOP House Majority so far to the right that it’s now unrecognizable to traditional conservatives. Their extremism has completely taken over, and now, MTG is the true power behind Kevin McCarthy. Possibly worst of all, they’re boosting ultra-MAGA presidential candidates like Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. If they set foot in the White House, it could be the end of democracy as we know it! You might be asking– what can I do about all this? The answer is quite simple. There’s only one way to stop them, and that is to absolutely demolish them at the ballot box in 2024. We need to send a clear message that their hateful and radical ideology have no place in America and that we, the people, strongly reject it! And if we are going to win in 2024, that starts with Georgia. Georgia was the closest state in 2020–President Biden won it by only 0.23%!–and it will be the most important battleground next year for keeping the White House and defeating the MAGA extremism led by Georgia’s Marjorie Taylor Greene. = | = Thank you for joining us in this fight, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Team Swalwell
subject: How George Santos tipped the House for Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
He flipped a swing seat, giving the GOP a razor-thin majority |

Like many of our other key ballot measure policies, paid leave is one area where there is a major disconnect between working people and the elected officials who represent them. Arizona, Colorado, Michigan, Washington, and Texas are all places where we’ve helped get this issue in front of voters, and time and again voters took action to pass the paid leave policies that they needed.
We’re so proud of the work we’ve done to help change the lives of working families in these states, **_but the vast majority of the U.S. still hasn’t enacted paid leave laws._ So, we’re gearing up for the fights ahead. **

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Less than 1%. That’s how close my race was in 2018. And this year could be no different. In order to WIN a GOP Senate Majority we MUST hold onto Florida. Senate Republicans are holding the line, but the truth is, we can’t make real headway until we take back our majority in 2024. From Florida to West Virginia, Montana, and Arizona, the Democrats are on the attack trying to hold on to control, and they’re bringing in MILLIONS to do it. With Senate Democrats smashing fundraising records, I’m calling on EVERY conservative to step up IMMEDIATELY. | | Peter, with the mainstream media in the Democrats’ pockets, they get thousands of hours of free airtime spreading their socialist lies. You’ve never given up on America before, and I know you’re not about to start now. Thank you, | | Senator Rick Scott (R-FL) Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Right now, Republicans are asking the Supreme Court to _completely dismantle_ Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. If they succeed, taking back the House majority and passing new protections will be the only way to defend voting rights at the national level.

**Here’s the bad news: Across the country, Republicans are trying to all but guarantee that they’ll hold the House majority by manipulating maps ahead of the next election:**
**POLITICO:
“Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering . . . [they] could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone.”**
---
**But here’s the good news, team:_We aren’t powerless against these attacks._**

Our grassroots movement has proven that, when we work together, we can accomplish incredible things. In fact, ahead of the 2022 elections, our work helped to secure a House map that the _New York Times_ called “the fairest . . . of the last 40 years.”

If we stay committed to this fight, I’m confident we can combat gerrymandering and voter suppression, strengthen our democracy, and place power back in the hands of the people. **But we can’t do it alone.**

With the GOP attacking our democracy on multiple fronts, it’s essential that we remain united and vigilant in our fight for fairness. Monthly donations help us plan for the long term by providing a steady stream of resources so we can make strategic investments and be prepared for whatever comes our way.

**That’s why I’m asking our top supporters to help sustain the NDRC’s democracy-saving work over the long term by committing to a monthly recurring donation. Can I count on you?**

clean_body: | | = President Obama is right, team. Here at the NDRC, we’re in a constant fight to protect our democracy from those who seek to weaken it – and that’s why I’m asking you to = to power our work. Will you pitch in? = Right now, Republicans are asking the Supreme Court to completely dismantle Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. If they succeed, taking back the House majority and passing new protections will be the only way to defend voting rights at the national level. Here’s the bad news: Across the country, Republicans are trying to all but guarantee that they’ll hold the House majority by manipulating maps ahead of the next election: POLITICO: “Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering . . . [they] could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone.” But here’s the good news, team:We aren’t powerless against these attacks. Our grassroots movement has proven that, when we work together, we can accomplish incredible things. In fact, ahead of the 2022 elections, our work helped to secure a House map that the New York Times called “the fairest . . . of the last 40 years.” If we stay committed to this fight, I’m confident we can combat gerrymandering and voter suppression, strengthen our democracy, and place power back in the hands of the people. But we can’t do it alone. With the GOP attacking our democracy on multiple fronts, it’s essential that we remain united and vigilant in our fight for fairness. Monthly donations help us plan for the long term by providing a steady stream of resources so we can make strategic investments and be prepared for whatever comes our way. That’s why I’m asking our top supporters to help sustain the NDRC’s democracy-saving work over the long term by committing to a monthly recurring donation. Can I count on you? = | = ---|--- = | = = | = – Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: James Carville (via DLCC.org)
subject: This is one of my biggest takeaways
body:
The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. | | |
---
| | One of my biggest takeaways from my time in politics is that **it’s _never_ too early to start preparing for the next election. ** That’s especially true for state-level special elections, which are historically underfunded and overlooked even though they have the same implications as races that happen on Election Day in November. In fact, there’s already been 22 special elections in state legislatures this year (can you believe that?!), **and I’m proud to say that the DLCC has won 14 of those races. We need to keep it up.** [With less than two weeks until critical special elections, state Democrats need a boost. Can you rush a quick donation of $7 – or whatever you can spare – to give the DLCC momentum ahead of upcoming special elections? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zkbUe8BRiNQSL7ILd1UmJ9V9WCOsjn88sa-IG3x7kFKyDhwWSbFE5vFZQAqzg4jRekeQ3kZ46PV6P6fakq3ZATG0vG3MwC3ImLqgvUw29VXwcArNcLHULCOpQQYPotUhzB1rVllEmcnVXVZ3OdVETeHOIBJNR5PrWC6BwPEiIsWq1QDszzRr19daepSmWa9nfIVzBdtSTyx2OrjNca26ruPaDc6FTrxU9VMGk_KUAUMW64oETGVHieeZLYa1vWsPq4mTD2U3wDiu7f9oh91CY2wpdYHj3PSuOjE6P39K0lYnaYTjUbFu_eLfJdo_1RLIZP5S98GGOMl1yvNvfeeMBuRAQGq6FLdpLFa0lR9h5nM3FBmGunwCG3B5E1p7n1AIcjexZFjXZUmThJBvUuJYVYJyhJ_PjOvu-ci8vsR8qITTrM_-wvqbqovz6psanzRQq_PkNDF3xMGfzii_EiRPTWWENtA_O-p1pmVrCYwEOiJt7NxyMPT4zljMc2vwfTkzHOvMzPC6v1I0Mujls_fchx6o8cbe8SeLVTgQ02KrAvFA/3vz/Uq_nU4umT_eSQARPohDBjg/h0/eUs39hyOtyGm9KxENPcQO25VqGHIEp6MzcZFyBF3EzM) With so much at stake, here’s what you need to know: → The DLCC is the ONLY party committee fully dedicated to electing state Democrats – and state legislators impact your day-to-day life more than federal candidates do.
→ State Democrats have been outraised by Republicans quarter after quarter, jeopardizing the DLCC’s chances of expanding Democratic power.
→ State Democrats are the LAST line of defense against GOP extremism in the states – they decide the fate of abortion rights, voting rights, and so much more. **The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda.** This team has to fight back with everything we’ve got, and I’m no stranger to tough fights. With far-right extremists ramping up momentum ahead of 2024, passing anti-democratic legislation, and creating gerrymandered maps, the DLCC _needs_ dedicated grassroots donors to get off the sidelines and invest in state Democrats _now_. [YOU are a large part of this team's mission, and early investments will provide the DLCC with funds to recruit, train, and support Democrats down-ballot nationwide. clean_body: The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. | | | | | One of my biggest takeaways from my time in politics is that it’s never too early to start preparing for the next election. That’s especially true for state-level special elections, which are historically underfunded and overlooked even though they have the same implications as races that happen on Election Day in November. In fact, there’s already been 22 special elections in state legislatures this year (can you believe that?!), and I’m proud to say that the DLCC has won 14 of those races. We need to keep it up. With so much at stake, here’s what you need to know: → The DLCC is the ONLY party committee fully dedicated to electing state Democrats – and state legislators impact your day-to-day life more than federal candidates do. → State Democrats have been outraised by Republicans quarter after quarter, jeopardizing the DLCC’s chances of expanding Democratic power. → State Democrats are the LAST line of defense against GOP extremism in the states – they decide the fate of abortion rights, voting rights, and so much more. The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. This team has to fight back with everything we’ve got, and I’m no stranger to tough fights. With far-right extremists ramping up momentum ahead of 2024, passing anti-democratic legislation, and creating gerrymandered maps, the DLCC needs dedicated grassroots donors to get off the sidelines and invest in state Democrats now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let’s do this! body:
Josh Hawley’s best friend in the MO Senate proposed legislation this week to allow murder charges for “anyone who gets an abortion, helps someone get an abortion or provides abortion care.”
#
Peter — Josh Hawley's best friend in the Missouri Senate proposed legislation last week to allow murder charges for _"anyone who gets an abortion, helps someone get an abortion or provides abortion care."_
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/32018?refcode=em20230507-3087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3087%2E614464%2EOiI2jr)

Wade, and finally protect abortion access in all 50 states. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for all your help, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ][IMG]

Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me from the start of this campaign: Please,
will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Tammy
Baldwin’s to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of
$3,000,000? [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and defend
our Senate majority. Please donate now →

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Colin Allred and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-allred.tdvYd2&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-allred.V80Zrk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-allred.eTei_O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-allred.Sg5EAI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-allred.vu2RLI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Tammy’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic
Senate majority →

Thank you so much for lending a helping hand to this campaign. We have a
long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this
thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230507_AM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]DONATE

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=259%2E35263%2EpgMOzM ]Privacy Policy

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Americans should not have to live in fear when running errands
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Texas leaders have failed to do anything to make their state safer.
#

Friends -
Americans should not have to live in fear of a mass shooting when they are going about their Saturdays, shopping, running errands, and living their lives.
But tragically, that’s what happened at a shopping mall in Allen, TX yesterday and another community is waking up this morning to mourn the loss of too many of their loved ones.
This should not be a typical Saturday in America. Yet this is a situation we have seen unfold time and time again.
Eight people senselessly lost their lives in Texas because our leaders refuse to act. In just a few weeks we will mark one year since the horrific mass shooting in Uvalde, and Texas leaders have failed to do anything to make their state safer. Instead, they’ve weakened state gun laws and given gun lobbyists everything they want.
There are real, lifesaving solutions to end America’s gun violence crisis, but our elected officials must choose to have the courage to act.
Nobody should have to live their life in fear of getting shot while running routine errands like going to the mall. I will not rest until we see a future where we can go about our daily lives without the fear of gunfire in our communities.
My heart is with the victims, survivors, and the people of Texas. We will never stop fighting to save lives from preventable gun violence. Please, keep standing with me in this crucial fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to Giffords PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230507-1-15&t=1&akid=5587%2E3935704%2EZIaum-)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5587%2E3935704%2EZIaum-) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Hi there,

Republicans hold just a FIVE seat majority in the House.
That means that some of the most important votes teeter on a knife’s edge.

We’ll explain more in a moment but first, can you please chip in $10 or more to protect Delaware’s Democratic House seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023

It may seem odd to talk about elections at this point in the year. Believe it or not, there is a LOT of work that goes into campaigns right now.
We plan out our path to victory, start to recruit staff, and build the infrastructure for our campaign.

Republicans ALSO use this time for planning, and they’re laser focused on expanding their narrow majority. We cannot take Delaware for granted. That’s why every dollar we raise (even in May) makes a huge difference.

We need 13 donations from this email to keep our numbers on track. Lisa is counting on you - will you please be one of them? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023

Thank you,
Team Lisa

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18948?t=1001&akid=3211%2E346206%2EU6HANW ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18948?t=1002&akid=3211%2E346206%2EU6HANW ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230507-3211-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3211_346206_U6HANW&akid=3211%2E346206%2EU6HANW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3211%2E346206%2EU6HANW

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Cori
subject: The GOP’s obsessive and draconian attacks on the LGBTQIA2S+ community.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
There is a real life-or-death impact of the Republican’s obsessive and draconian attacks on the LGBTQIA2S+ community.
#
Hi Peter,
Far-right Republicans are on a depraved, disgusting, and dangerous mission to erase trans lives.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230507.9VQvNv&refcode=em20230507-2632&t=1&akid=2632%2E1082990%2Euu15pt)
**Cori won’t let this disturbing trend of anti-LGBTQIA2S+ extremism go unchecked.**[**Can you chip in $5 to help us accelerate our efforts to combat these attacks?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230507.9VQvNv&refcode=em20230507-2632&t=2&akid=2632%2E1082990%2Euu15pt)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230507.9VQvNv&refcode=em20230507-2632&t=21&akid=2632%2E1082990%2Euu15pt)**
There is a real life-or-death impact of the Republican’s obsessive and draconian attacks on the LGBTQIA2S+ community through state and federal legislation that attempts to criminalize vulnerable students, parents, healthcare providers, and members of the trans community.
That’s why we need to build up as much support, collective power, and momentum to protect the fundamental rights of every trans person in our country — but we can’t do it without you.
**[Chip in $5 to show your support.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230507.9VQvNv&refcode=em20230507-2632&t=22&akid=2632%2E1082990%2Euu15pt)**
— Team Cori

name: Candace Owens, Chair of BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Why BLEXIT is joining Turning Point USA
body:
BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left's victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" \-- is joining Turning Point USA
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osqD_i7DNt)
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61773709:sqD_i7DNt:m:1:2532013465:1EA994C3D6974ADB9D582CABF34952CB:r)
---
Fellow American, Candace Owens here - and I've got exciting news. **BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left 's victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" \-- is joining Turning Point USA!** Alongside my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to: _Defeat_ toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory - getting them out of our kids' classrooms forever, _Free_ black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American Dreams, and _Win_ against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased "educators," Big Tech, and more! [**To accomplish these massive - and important goals - I must raise $100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61773709:sqD_i7DNt:m:1:2532013465:1EA994C3D6974ADB9D582CABF34952CB:r)
---
[**Stand with Candace and Turning Point USA**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61773709:sqD_i7DNt:m:1:2532013465:1EA994C3D6974ADB9D582CABF34952CB:r)
---
When the BLEXIT team and I decided that it was time for us to offer _even more_ life-changing programs ... expose _even more_ of the Left's toxic and racist lies ... and reach _even more_ minorities with our inspiring message about the American Dream, I thought of my friend Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA right away. body:
Personal message for you from Adam Frisch
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62944723/405065139/-321553144?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2546-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZjAyZjRjLWY5ZWMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ASu4GdebzuRaBNde2OyrLgkaAyu2FoflTPeeXjwhPqo=)
Hello,

$10.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $10.

$10 because last year, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.

$10 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country.

$10 because the first poll of the campaign shows I am tied with Boebert, 45% to 45%.

And $10 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.

I know $10 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. We cannot stop here or let up.

We’ve set a goal to raise another $100,000 to defeat Boebert, and we are just $12,182 away.

********
Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.
**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office. **
Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.
I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.
I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.
And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because**it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
>From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.
But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.[If you’re all in on this fight, split a grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Michael Bennet >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62947136/405072174/-1603379195?refcode=X_050723_Heinrich_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTZmYTFmYy0wMGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwbAD9fHe8qb3DeWtzJajO_uKGiSKnPPMNffH778Pro=)**
Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.
— Martin

Peter Willis,

mobilized our 100,000 members in Chicago to power Brandon Johnson to
victory over rightwing Democrat Paul Vallas in the Mayor’s race –
defeating one of the most entrenched establishment machines in American
politics!

Now, with just days left until Election Day in Philadelphia, Bernie has
joined us in taking on the establishment again to help elect another
proven champion for working people, Helen Gym, for Mayor.

Our Revolution has 30,000 supporters in Philly, and with the race within
the margin of error, what we do to turn out the vote will make all the
difference.

**Former Vice President Joe Biden** will “decide” not to seek re-election.
**Michele Obama** will become the nominee for the Democratic Party (side note: IMO - Transgenderism will be a MAJOR plank of the campaign for the obvious reasons).

**My prediction - Trump vs. Obama 2024...**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | | That was our average donation in April, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: | | | | | Did you hear the good news, Peter? Joe Biden rubber stamp David Trone announced today that he's making a run for Senate. That means our Congressional seat will be wide open! This is our chance to replace a far-left 'progressive' Democrat with a commonsense Maryland-first Republican! With an open-seat race, we have the best chance of flipping Maryland's 6th District RED and protecting your Constitutional rights. David Trone only saw his time in the 6th District as a stepping stone to the Senate. I won't be a rubber stamp for ANYONE. I am running to fight for the America I want to see for my kids, family, neighbors, and for YOU. Thank you,Mariela Roca | | | | | | | Mariela Roca is a veteran of the U.S. Air Force. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c51644d3f734cb7912d3aea2199b1e4&_e=AGcQKDVrgfDJg5hFXrZqeLaMg87Twrdvn8IQ4xNF1bTTR6hI_uThR3y26R3YFxFhdTcj_CvOotfBXRWGjcDXvhibm70Qq-lr-Y-cRgkFyTcwaXFcllft9pd_rw-uUE84e-TYxlKgRqXFRKBfGF_oL3UCPjgs5H_pl8QDXPK7bg4fAWX8OgYQq5pDxqHoGjAqsl9rBA73TYPvLYBsbbBJZtRSkWY_oaiGgz9uj1Q_AF7MjtmLI0AFKw2VwjFTNnLfQSxXGgB7SnuSm7URVA-zp6NEumv9JvCGIwhlWT5FTN8JpsRNhP_H-uaGi6--GqiXeXF1r0MAbvTpSBs66qg_rUoWkFSRWFU7uhx6uadOTRgAuoJ5JDhnBLvKXNLE17ERpc1xXrNXvD_7qwB1br-Sjw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Read this. You won’t regret it. | = Peter, Mississippi's critical Election Day is only six months away, and we're standing at a crossroads. We can either stick to the same old script of corrupt politics, where special interests pull the strings, and our governor looks out for himself. Or, we can jerk the slack out of the chain and deliver much-needed change. = Look, I jumped in this race because I know Mississippi is hurting right now. We’ve been lied to and abandoned by Tate Reeves ever since he got into office. I am determined to change that. Imagine a Mississippi with high-speed internet in every household, a booming economy, expanded Medicaid, and fully funded hospitals. No more corruption scandals on the evening news. And a leader who will always put you above special interests. Here’s the good news: the polls show we can do it. That’s right. The latest poll shows that we are within the margin of error with Reeves. That's how close we are to bringing real change to the Magnolia State. So what do you say, Peter? = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let’s do this, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Dear Friends,

Early voting started on Friday and will continue this week at your local Registrar's Office. If you can't make it to the polls on Election Day, June 20, then try to get out and vote this week.

For events this week, we have a Meet & Greet on Thursday, May 11, in Chesdin Landing, and another Super Saturday on May 13. And next week, we have a Meet & Greet in Brandermill on Thursday, May 18.

To commemorate Armed Forces Day on Saturday, May 20 we are hosting a free breakfast. There are only a few remaining seats, which are reserved for Veterans and their families. [Please sign up today](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

Please take a look at the events listed below.

And come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Input Needed (via DLCC.org)
subject: What Elizabeth Warren just said about the Supreme Court→
body:
Please take two minutes to share your thoughts. We’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our survey today. | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** Senator Elizabeth Warren called for a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices like Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett. _Even the American Bar Association agreed!_ **THEN:** Experts revealed Chief Justice John Roberts’ wife unethically made $10.3 million in commission from elite law firms. At least one of those firms had even argued a case before Chief Justice Roberts _after_ paying his wife a huge sum of money. **AND NOW:** Clarence Thomas is being accused of taking money from a Republican mega-donor to pay for his grandnephew’s boarding school – **and the Justice didn’t disclose many of these payments!** **Can you share your thoughts in our brief survey on whether Supreme Court justices should abide by a code of ethics?** | **Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**

Yes
No
Unsure
**[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV50n3ghiKO15QNV_uEXz7TLn6Sm6Ub6t0_MhSkKUg430dsyoWEy3qoKdE8ssqUqts3Tqo3B1AKAKItMAprkumwTTbzl_tGI7XrSbDj3oCcqD_qvR3f_3Wv_979MqjjKSTypE4xx8FxDPNNLyFOk74Pr18vCBgbHGARNu9g1eWKR_F0NBZk3OQZ67GcU_SR0RSANqyewaZ2Mq4obVDD9_CKr3ZQ0GTqxxoLgmBjleVK-Mh8F642X5A9vNqRg0Yxdmrs3WQ_ys2V3u-nWTmglYh4P1W0xO70VWeYbh2ebbr692XqS30Ry1-EVUXInoBgr_ZJVcBhyepiS-I9abEzdjXp8XThwhLO_0Jp4ABSvdOudCFXSqRsbiXLSSrJsfbpOAJ/3vz/kSe3JY9QSk-c1z3QeKWqlw/h0/Rj_r-unwFliSRQmTQrelhJKph6w4k-m6qylhk4CczLA)**
---
**The truth is:** Supreme Court justices make legal decisions that affect millions of Americans, and they serve for life – there is no reason why they shouldn’t be held to the standard every lawyer and judge in the U.S. is held to.
The impartiality that has come before the Supreme Court in the past few years cannot continue to be overlooked – **the American people deserve honesty and trust, not money bribes and conflicts of interest.**
[_**Before Congress decides if the Supreme Court should officially abide by a code of ethics, we want to hear from you. Can you take our survey?**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV50n3ghiKO15QNV_uEXz7TLn6Sm6Ub6t0_MhSkKUg430dsyoWEy3qoKdE8ssqUqts3Tqo3B1AKAKItMAprkumwTTbzl_tGI7XrSbDj3oCcqD_qvR3f_3Wv_979MqjjKSTYv4zfuxOJnZ3yBAHFuvyzra5JUv08PpnXxg6DD7gPfF5E7cbwXqTL1u1q9IVWBiUW8mqsLDQA68iNckoaOQjHZK3lUi-zqWzOCpr9y-UpYtZN5leh3jBbka24hshg5E9S72SAAerzyaDq5YMAeFN4tQJ5LdU0eiVRbw6JorwBiB8n3Tb8QKASexUoZHqaFwEaCPT9nToAY-M4bCDKTR0-NWEsUhJnkq8MyZsyVuCHbg_HfDMUsO6nVGA16juShnK/3vz/kSe3JY9QSk-c1z3QeKWqlw/h1/oK1PV7ZxERWfxx9lGnQtdUK8fQnUhHgKVVdq6b86Bh4)

clean_body: Please take two minutes to share your thoughts. We’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our survey today. | | | | | FIRST: Senator Elizabeth Warren called for a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices like Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett. Even the American Bar Association agreed! THEN: Experts revealed Chief Justice John Roberts’ wife unethically made $10.3 million in commission from elite law firms. At least one of those firms had even argued a case before Chief Justice Roberts after paying his wife a huge sum of money. AND NOW: Clarence Thomas is being accused of taking money from a Republican mega-donor to pay for his grandnephew’s boarding school – and the Justice didn’t disclose many of these payments! Can you share your thoughts in our brief survey on whether Supreme Court justices should abide by a code of ethics? | Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices? Yes No Unsure The truth is: Supreme Court justices make legal decisions that affect millions of Americans, and they serve for life – there is no reason why they shouldn’t be held to the standard every lawyer and judge in the U.S. is held to. The impartiality that has come before the Supreme Court in the past few years cannot continue to be overlooked – the American people deserve honesty and trust, not money bribes and conflicts of interest. Thanks for taking action, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
This is one way to say thank you to my grassroots donors!
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7Ijw-AezYNHUN4tG6abqzy4y9pBMhA0CU3T79BVR7t1-52h0Po2L00D9e8vqIwO4U1gYABNfGMBZHv981-ffZ1seL7iVViu57Sl8ZQD5fcLP6uvKAaOjYae1LUIL3oD3BbZcGyGN1kIU95a7Rsla9V0DjUautTS98rrWInRdx01BLVQgKlXVvOGVqA5SeaV5L4M2NXbQM1ltlA5hTG4IjzyvcTr4MRZDe895Wp6TTgxOC_p1xsNGacawN3bm_mLpIs7kXfkYKeWyX1OYHS2UbqUfY6ScERmckh-EUeB432PtDHQKmTitOV4jBlojE_blq3e4jOvskQnr6epezLs4ObolJuyH00cypowpM2FNIzgDfU0DBSbs5fKGP-_pl_7xhM-PCPsPH5He1DdXzG2YNhoGWnTNZHXbF-xu_wMAAP__-8qNcQ)

Friend,
Grassroots donors like you are the bedrock of our MAGA movement.
That’s why I’m always thinking of ways to show my appreciation for all of your support.
And recently, I just came up with a new great idea...
On the eve of my birthday, I’ll be hosting a fundraising dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster....
_**...So why not offer the chance for a grassroots donor to join us!**_

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Official Statement of Outrage...
body:
Regarding the incident at Plainview South Elementary School

| | | |
---
**\- MAY 7, 2023 -**
**STATEMENT BY JAMESON ELLIS**
I am profoundly disturbed and outraged by recent events at Plainview South Elementary School in Plainview, Texas. It has come to my attention that a first-grade girl was sexually assaulted by multiple boys. At the same time, her teacher was present in her classroom, and the incident was filmed on a school iPad.

This tragic incident is not an isolated event but a symptom of a more significant issue plaguing our public schools today. The increasing influence of leftist ideology and policies in our educational system and removing God and morality from schools have created an environment where such atrocities can occur. I believe that the eroding moral fabric of our society and the overreach of government interference in our children's education have played a part in this heinous act.

The family of the victim was not informed of the incident by the school, and it was only through their own investigation that they could uncover the horrifying truth. The school administration's decision to prioritize self-preservation over the well-being of a first-grade child is a direct consequence of a system that has lost sight of its core values and purpose.

The superintendent's assertion that he did "everything that was required of him" is disingenuous and a disgraceful attempt to evade responsibility for this egregious failure. It is high time that we address the impact of leftist policies and the absence of moral values in our schools. This is just the tip of the iceberg regarding public education issues today.

We The People, demand a thorough and transparent investigation into this incident and the administration's handling. We call for immediate disciplinary action against those responsible and implement more robust measures to ensure the safety and protection of all students in the district.

Additionally, we urge lawmakers and education authorities to re-evaluate the role of government in our children's education and restore parents' rights to be actively involved in their children's lives!

We stand with the victim and her family and others who feel powerless against the "big ed."

I have been told there will be a protest on May 18, 2023, in Plainview, TX, and you can bet that I will be there. I urge my supporters to be there as well.

We demand that justice be served and hope that no other family will have to endure the pain and suffering that this family has experienced due to the negligence and callousness of those entrusted with the care of our children.
_For Liberty,_
| | |

---
|

# Batavia News - State budget appalls area GOP lawmakers

Area lawmakers blasted the $229 billion state budget approved Tuesday night, more than a month after it was due.

The state Senate and Assembly approved the budget in lightning rounds of votes and debates five days after Gov. Kathy Hochul and lawmakers finally reached a budget deal.

The budget, which is on its way to Hochul's desk for final approval, passed the Assembly shortly before 11 p.m. Tuesday, after clearing the Senate earlier.

"After weeks of negotiations and six budget extenders, the final state budget ended up right where it started: too much spending, too much regulation, too many taxes and too many reasons for people to leave New York," said State Sen. Rob Ortt, R-North Tonawanda in a statement issued minutes afterward. "Delays and dysfunction produced another runaway spending plan in the form of a $229 billion budget that doesn't begin to scratch the surface of the state's most pressing issues.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: What we've predicted is official: Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024.
body:
Sacking Ted Cruz from the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf04c3a0a-5327-4a09-98ce-ad7d6409fabc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We have just the person to sack Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: _Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe575701-873c-44da-b82a-5391114849d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This is huge, and by that I don't just mean Colin Allred:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf4dfa75-8efc-45de-8d88-2110b0c83422/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yes, he's a large guy who played football in the NFL. But he's a real tough guy--not a petrified wimp play-acting tough like Cruz. _**_Allred was raised by a single mother and worked his way up to joining the Obama Administration. Then, in a huge upset, he knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018 in a key swing seat._**_ Allred's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, with charisma as large as he is._ _Meanwhile, In addition to being a sleazoid who left Texans to freeze as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. _**_Cruz is on tape talking to nutball Maria Bartiromo about creating a fake commission to steal the election in 2020._** [**_The legal system will do what it'll do. What ___we__ _ can do is kick Cruz' seditionist arse outta the Senate in '24, when Allred destroys this shell of a man who barely held on by 2.5% vs Beto O'Rourke in '18. So, will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to elect outstanding Allred and remove Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1c53641-008f-4dbe-8408-917e0de8744e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us elect a champion, and ousting a despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T609e2621-4ab2-4b05-a753-50e19ab28ea8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Defend our police officers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d4d3132872aa4fdeadd967e6c7d69440&_e=vrnMPixSm0MQpY2wUOQsn-oJ3UDQWtUVhX6wesP_E3lH7peH3WqOKQjAYfjjBvipg41UnCObK-9d0FfuQJXMXI1XAjX7Kl3_1_7liK8s5RFKJFNcSlXNNhmQZ0gwA1Ao5ybqD4WxF9kFujmClUNPIssSON3xqlnDQpC-QaYyPGHnZ0Yh2NWOcmt1sTFnERneiCOA3WxiE3vqbDWAzdiCGPtIUIY2gTcdaotz2K6zaonndzZRDpGvtIUDj1jphw7Ld-fyZ_jB-rWTdZG_yK6UlACaAOU665P5XJDya1aSNyvN3g05kfIOgNA8MOCbzWYvwfZC7sM51zInxtP6CA2o3jbQNi0YO1YFT33nBsmpLpFnVCCGnH7358LHEBsHnFbZGOeBPU_YsBSGdjsy00VcKVI-yaRWMTra2ikxUlveHDEFuQR-TMc20RgNU84DWYAUrv56bBG1rxRgdi6EDky25iIkm4-dg2ac9m8G3GP1JlU%3D) Since 2020, the murder rate has increased _dramatically_ in cities like ours. Crime has skyrocketed, and like you, I no longer recognize the country I call home. _And it’s no coincidence that it coincides with the DECIMATION of police departments in blue states and cities across America._ **Today’s Democrats are more interested in punishing the people who solve crimes than the people who commit them. They will not stop at decimating our police force - radical Democratic Socialists are just getting started.** I know it seems too crazy to be true, but the backwards Left is putting YOU in danger. **[I’m proud to support our brave law enforcement officers in Florida and across the country, and now, I need your help to hold onto a Republican House majority that will ALWAYS back the blue! Because my priority is fighting to put more money in the pockets of folks like you, not Big Pharma or the insurance lobby.

Hey team – Greg here.

Whenever I’m going around the district talking to folks about the issues that matter most to them, one concern consistently arises: Folks are sick and tired of politicians who place corporate and personal interests over the needs of the people they were elected to represent. And quite frankly: I agree.

**That’s why I pledged to not accept a dime of corporate PAC money.** Because my sole priority is fighting for folks like you and working to put money back in your pockets.

Not the pockets of pharmaceutical companies. Not the pockets of the insurance lobby. And not the pockets of any other Big Money special interest group – _just the pockets of the hard-working folks here in Ohio._

As your member of Congress, I will never put corporate interests before the interests of the children and families I represent. You have my word on that.

[**But that means, when it comes to raising the money we need to win another tough election, I need to rely on the power of this grassroots team. Is there any amount you’d be willing to pitch in to our people-powered campaign today? Any amount makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62956044/405080541/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.07_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjZDA1ZC0xMGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=joM325WevYR-D51C_r8f0KeItwrFh3zN9bXE9rhxJTg=)

clean_body: Because my priority is fighting to put more money in the pockets of folks like you, not Big Pharma or the insurance lobby. | = Hey team – Greg here. Whenever I’m going around the district talking to folks about the issues that matter most to them, one concern consistently arises: Folks are sick and tired of politicians who place corporate and personal interests over the needs of the people they were elected to represent. And quite frankly: I agree. That’s why I pledged to not accept a dime of corporate PAC money. Because my sole priority is fighting for folks like you and working to put money back in your pockets. Not the pockets of pharmaceutical companies. Not the pockets of the insurance lobby. And not the pockets of any other Big Money special interest group – just the pockets of the hard-working folks here in Ohio. As your member of Congress, I will never put corporate interests before the interests of the children and families I represent. You have my word on that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O.
