clean_body: it’s that simple! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, we know it’s a Sunday night and we hate to bother you under the circumstances... But the hard truth is that though we were hopeful we’d be able to fend off the “summer fundraising slump” that campaigns typically face for a few more weeks, our ActBlue data over the past month paints a much more grim picture... | Look, folks – we know, $1 can’t possibly be enough in a competitive district like ours, but the truth is, we don’t need to be swinging for the fences this early in the election. But what we do need is to prove to our Republican opponents that our grassroots team means business, and that none of us are willing to back down from the fight ahead. 500 DONATIONS NEEDED If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for stepping up to join this grassroots movement! name: Team Beshear
subject: "The most expensive gubernatorial race"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Since the start of 2023, billionaire Kelly Craft has loaned her own campaign almost $10 million. Peter,

Billionaire Kelly Craft isn't ashamed to use her deep pockets to stay competitive and fund her own campaign. She knows just how competitive the governor's race is — that’s why she's spent **millions** of her own money to run.

**But don’t just take it from us. Here’s what she had to say about it:** _“This may be one of the most expensive gubernatorial races in this cycle, and**I have the personal resources.** ”_

While Craft has spent $10 million of her own money to buy the Republican nomination, Andy has been busy building a grassroots campaign funded by the people of Kentucky. The people of our commonwealth deserve better than a candidate who thinks they can buy their way to the Governor's Office.

[**Peter, we need your support today. Will you donate any amount you can today to support this grassroots campaign and help power Andy to victory this November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62956140/405082706/96677371?refcode=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cbaf38c3-11ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFmMzhjMy0xMWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xp_ExYBSp4LJKS3SsvwrdneNageqAuzdnnHlk3w7KQ8=) [SUPPORT ANDY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62956142/405082709/96677371?refcode=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cbaf38c3-11ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFmMzhjMy0xMWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xp_ExYBSp4LJKS3SsvwrdneNageqAuzdnnHlk3w7KQ8=) It's not just Craft's nearly unlimited resources that are making this the most **expensive** gubernatorial race this cycle – outside spending groups have already poured millions of dollars into Kentucky. Kelly’s husband, Joe Craft, has even contributed $1.5 million to a PAC that supports her. These groups will spend big to flood our airwaves from now until Election Day to defeat Andy and undo the progress he's made for Kentucky.

In order to keep up with his opponents and outside group spending, Andy is relying on this grassroots team's support. **[Make a donation to Andy's re-election campaign to help him prepare for this expensive race so he can continue making progress for Kentuckians →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62956144/405082711/96677371?refcode=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cbaf38c3-11ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFmMzhjMy0xMWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xp_ExYBSp4LJKS3SsvwrdneNageqAuzdnnHlk3w7KQ8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62956146/405082713/96677371?refcode=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230507_craft_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cbaf38c3-11ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFmMzhjMy0xMWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xp_ExYBSp4LJKS3SsvwrdneNageqAuzdnnHlk3w7KQ8=)

clean_body: Since the start of 2023, billionaire Kelly Craft has loaned her own campaign almost $10 million. Peter, Billionaire Kelly Craft isn't ashamed to use her deep pockets to stay competitive and fund her own campaign. She knows just how competitive the governor's race is — that’s why she's spent millions of her own money to run. But don’t just take it from us. Here’s what she had to say about it: “This may be one of the most expensive gubernatorial races in this cycle, andI have the personal resources. ” While Craft has spent $10 million of her own money to buy the Republican nomination, Andy has been busy building a grassroots campaign funded by the people of Kentucky. The people of our commonwealth deserve better than a candidate who thinks they can buy their way to the Governor's Office. = = It's not just Craft's nearly unlimited resources that are making this the most expensive gubernatorial race this cycle – outside spending groups have already poured millions of dollars into Kentucky. Kelly’s husband, Joe Craft, has even contributed $1.5 million to a PAC that supports her. These groups will spend big to flood our airwaves from now until Election Day to defeat Andy and undo the progress he's made for Kentucky. In order to keep up with his opponents and outside group spending, Andy is relying on this grassroots team's support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Thank you, Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

I’ll be blunt, team. We are at a crucial turning point for democracy in states like Ohio and across the nation where anti-democracy legislation threatens the will of the people and important redistricting reform. In Ohio, a column on _Cleveland.com_ observes that **_‘Forcing a major constitutional change onto a low-turnout ballot violates centuries of Ohio norms.”_**
**The way I see it, there are two outcomes, but only one option will protect Ohioan’s freedoms and voting rights:**
[**OPTION 1:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62959128/405097456/-1292217849?refcode=20230506_AOTL_F_POTUSQuote_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1NTlkZDQ5LTMzZWQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zl2c1yCMEKDhJukP175qYOMXDqG-uscazr3bh5MZ-Dk=) Conservative legislators pass anti-democracy amendment HRJ1/SJR2, which would limit the people’s ability in Ohio to amend the state constitution and give more power to special interests and extreme politicians.
Or
[**OPTION 2:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62959129/405097459/-1292217849?refcode=20230506_AOTL_F_POTUSQuote_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1NTlkZDQ5LTMzZWQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zl2c1yCMEKDhJukP175qYOMXDqG-uscazr3bh5MZ-Dk=) We fight back by urging state legislators to oppose the anti-democracy amendment, HJR1/SJR2, and protect Ohioans’ ability to participate and have a say in our democratic processes through citizen-led ballot initiatives.
**[Will you choose OPTION 2 and make a $25 donation to All On The Line today to help us keep up our fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62959130/405097460/-1292217849?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20230506_AOTL_F_POTUSQuote_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1NTlkZDQ5LTMzZWQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zl2c1yCMEKDhJukP175qYOMXDqG-uscazr3bh5MZ-Dk=)**

name: Biden-Harris Alert
subject: INCOMING: More lies from Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Lies, lies, and more lies is all we can expect from Donald Trump at this point. But we can’t let him get away with it. | | |
---

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi,
Nomination petitions are officially out!
Here's the deal: we need to hit a certain number of signatures before next year to qualify for the Arizona ballot.
Signing the petition is an easy way to show your support for Kirsten. If you live in AZ-06, click here to sign on. And if you aren't sure, click here to find out! >> [https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/]
Add your name to nominate Kirsten! [https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/]
Kirsten's priority is being the best leader possible for AZ-06 — while her opponent's just focused on making the GOP happy. It's why he's voted against clean energy jobs in our district and in favor of cutting earned benefits like Medicare.
Our people-powered campaign depends on support from folks like you. Taking a minute to sign the nomination petition goes a long way in showing our grassroots strength.
That's why we have to ask: will you take a minute to fill out Kirsten Engel's nomination petition [https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/] and then donate to support her campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050723_NomPet]
Thank you so much!
— Team Kirsten Engel for Arizona
Donate now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050723_NomPet]
Donate monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050723_NomPet&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050723_NomPet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050723_NomPet] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050723_NomPet]

Friend,
We’ve learned that Democrat organizations are circulating petitions calling for ANOTHER indictment of President Trump!

name: Barack Obama
subject: Team, our mission for a fairer, more just, and more equal America is far from complete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team,

Last month, Wisconsin voters resoundingly elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz, a fair-minded justice, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court by a commanding margin. **It was an incredibly important victory for our democracy – and I couldn’t be more proud that A.G. Holder and the NDRC helped make it possible.**

For more than a decade, Republicans have relied on anti-democratic tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto power in Wisconsin. The NDRC has tried to change that, making Wisconsin a top priority.

Since 2018, the NDRC has helped break total Republican control of Wisconsin's government – successfully mobilizing Wisconsin voters and advocates, investing in democracy defenders and champions of fair maps running for office, and supporting fair-minded candidates for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And now Judge Protasiewicz’s victory broke Republican control of the state’s supreme court for the first time in 15 years.

All of these victories add up. This is what progress and protecting democracy looks like.

**I’ve often said that real change happens one person and one community at a time – and we’re seeing that in Wisconsin. By donating to the NDRC today, you can take concrete action to help continue strengthening our democracy nationwide. Will you contribute today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, Last month, Wisconsin voters resoundingly elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz, a fair-minded justice, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court by a commanding margin. It was an incredibly important victory for our democracy – and I couldn’t be more proud that A.G. Holder and the NDRC helped make it possible. For more than a decade, Republicans have relied on anti-democratic tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto power in Wisconsin. The NDRC has tried to change that, making Wisconsin a top priority. Since 2018, the NDRC has helped break total Republican control of Wisconsin's government – successfully mobilizing Wisconsin voters and advocates, investing in democracy defenders and champions of fair maps running for office, and supporting fair-minded candidates for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And now Judge Protasiewicz’s victory broke Republican control of the state’s supreme court for the first time in 15 years. All of these victories add up. This is what progress and protecting democracy looks like. I’ve often said that real change happens one person and one community at a time – and we’re seeing that in Wisconsin. By donating to the NDRC today, you can take concrete action to help continue strengthening our democracy nationwide. Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the _**Ramaswamy TSUNAMI.**_

Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate.

To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (_which are steadily climbing_) and unique, grassroots donors.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (_bye Don Lemon_) and Chuck Todd. **I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th.**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Top dollar for a middle seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
This isn't an email about airline ticket prices (although Katie has fought against monopolies that drive up ticket costs)
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22496%2E3422442%2Ez0vWtn)
Derek, have you ever paid top dollar for a last minute plane ticket? And you end up in a middle seat, and with a connection, all because you didn't book the flight a while back?
This isn't an email about airline ticket prices (although Katie has fought against monopolies that drive up ticket costs). It's to show you why donations given now make such a difference. **When we're able to make TV ad reservations far in advance, we get better rates and better options.** If we have to scramble to make reservations, we're left paying top dollar for 3AM spots.
**[Can you make a donation today to help us plan ahead and get the most bang for our buck?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17652?refcode=EMAH07_1_AIR_20230507_V1_F&t=2&akid=22496%2E3422442%2Ez0vWtn)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230507-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH07_1_AIR_20230507_V1_F&refcode2=22496_3422442_z0vWtn&akid=22496%2E3422442%2Ez0vWtn)**
Investing in our campaign early on gives us the best chance at success. **Another candidate started this race with three times the cash we began with, and it's important we catch up sooner rather than later.** Thanks so much for being a part of our campaign.
Team KP
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230507-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH07_1_AIR_20230507_V1_F&refcode2=22496_3422442_z0vWtn&akid=22496%2E3422442%2Ez0vWtn)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH07_1_AIR_20230507_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=22496_3422442_z0vWtn&akid=22496%2E3422442%2Ez0vWtn)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: need to explain why this is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team, time is running out before my midnight fundraising deadline – so before I ask you to help us reach our crucial $25,000 goal, I need to explain why this is so important.

**Experts from CNN to FiveThirtyEight say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and that Senate control could all come down to what happens here in Ohio.** We have the power to win this race, but not without overwhelming grassroots support from folks like you.

I’m determined to keep up the fight for workers and families in Ohio – and to defend our Democratic Senate majority so we can continue making much-needed progress for the American people. **But as a top GOP target for defeat, I simply cannot defend my battleground seat and deliver this progress without you by my side.**

[Please: Before our deadline, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and Voter Protection Project so we can hit our $25,000 goal and power our reelection campaign to victory? Every dollar counts as we work to defeat the GOP and defend our Senate majority.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44575?t=6&akid=7512%2E878179%2ELg53YD) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44576?t=7&akid=7512%2E878179%2ELg53YD)

[**May 7, 1718:** New Orleans, renowned for its vast French Quarter, was founded by Jean-Baptiste Le Moyne de Bienville. In 1717, Bienville identified a location off the Mississippi River that he deemed secure from tidal surges and hurricanes. He urged his company to establish a city at that site, marking the inception of one of the South's most prominent cities, New Orleans.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=61e6cc0753664b0996b475ce7b8fba35&_e=9KUvutsGCCGljbxz5IrxO8UAwtt_-7LG8k5_OYk6j7hA91v4r5bZ6iHVCHmWDaW9Vep3yhrM601XS5W2u5lp-qNzButgnxAe57f36hGOJCjCkOgJa7BVnA81wOfZucDjYGk3_RWw60tbD-tBrWCVmbT5cwXGYwVb-a6MufEfLznHL3FA6N0Ejwx2N63MHvQR3qXzlh18_xmvL--wiHNu4mvK9j1nFmEuWhM1t4dGeWBrw_5-P50lnQiHELlOANq3Q-HDGVUl8fEQ9f9J3uqp1w%3D%3D) **Source -[famousdaily.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=61e6cc0753664b0996b475ce7b8fba35&_e=9KUvutsGCCGljbxz5IrxO8UAwtt_-7LG8k5_OYk6j7hA91v4r5bZ6iHVCHmWDaW9Vep3yhrM601XS5W2u5lp-qNzButgnxAe57f36hGOJChNIXKFUhWOaxEL-QesWsHejiN3k4HAiTV0rwyJpEUtrMI7s6uBRYnRvfAfPEfZxgl1YZ_gvc1Em2JGoSN20odBVkjWmMgwBGF-fFrQnlp3HgRrq2oRyPdy77Dr8a8mv6RUZ9en7x-IMpcTOBQrYhuiIZ14vACjDxFhZgDTyDJ68Q%3D%3D)**

[**May 7, 1862:** The Battle of Eltham's Landing, also referred to as the Battle of West Point, was a significant battle in New Kent County, Virginia, as part of the American Civil War's Peninsula Campaign. The attack was in response to the Union threat to Confederate army's trains. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=61e6cc0753664b0996b475ce7b8fba35&_e=clIF_Le2NFIohKvm4FylygHxQqC6V_O1lmGHWs6jvfUHQbOfRsSifCuC5qGxdZ81BT2u5_sRRbDIIuxLsNg91viLafOGqMoWGYRol__kuX3U69_VS_l9_dcsmQxn5iFcECzTaZLqigp-DQE2AC2TXXhFhvYXNAcd_l2vIhyyXnB6kc9qDMSjmGI6uEiVBmBUcY8oXIq8ZP_95m6M2JCrN8vSLYDrDJJyYcrHfcXDIZM%3D) **Source -[mycivilwar.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=61e6cc0753664b0996b475ce7b8fba35&_e=clIF_Le2NFIohKvm4FylygHxQqC6V_O1lmGHWs6jvfUHQbOfRsSifCuC5qGxdZ81BT2u5_sRRbDIIuxLsNg91szZH3un3sVtHLCyJ0jZd262j9BDu-H277qxN_9bxfZtHQVItGvOf_HN_AKnanfuBT-jvP-bAG-3or76jMP2nakGD6zENgEHvKndhSmM7VqU1xtldqeSDZvJhvirGMAFEcSX-5lv79PaXPmfj1bDBcg%3D)**

name: Peter Welch
subject: The Council for a Livable World

body:
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1262%2E61531%2EP5_FQF)
Friend,
Last year, The Council for a Livable World endorsed my campaign. Their endorsement was important to me, and I want to take this opportunity to tell you about their mission.
The Council’s chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons. This includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control, and commonsense defense spending in order to create a more livable world.
[Would you add your name to their monthly newsletter to learn more about their work?](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5472?t=3&akid=1262%2E61531%2EP5_FQF)
Organizations that combine strategic election interventions with a thoughtful approach and important insight are key to making the world safer.[**
**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5312?t=4&akid=1262%2E61531%2EP5_FQF)
Thanks, [**
**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5312?t=5&akid=1262%2E61531%2EP5_FQF)
Peter

---

| | We know the American Dream starts on Main Street, not Wall Street. Yet, massive tax cuts for billionaires and giant corporations -- along with losses of union-supported livable wage job -- have led to a $50 trillion transfer of wealth from working class people's homes and retirement accounts to the uber-rich. It's sinful. If it wasn't for billionaries' tax cuts and wars in Afghanistan and Iraq, our national debt today would be zero, instead of over $30 trillion. There are other ways of addressing the national debt than cutting services to those who need it the most. Holding the deficit ransom if Democrats don't agree - also immoral. In total, the debt ceiling has been revised 78 times since the '60s. Since 1960, Republicans have led a vote to revise the debt ceiling 49 times. Defaulting on our debt would result in an immediate recession. There are other ways to address our national debt. We must spend wisely, help people in need, and support small businesses, families, and workers. This fight starts in districts like ours, in the rural heartland, where small town America thrives. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula need a fighter in Congress; someone who can stand up to the corporate big wigs and lobbyists, and I'm eager for that job. {{FirstName}} - Please join my grassroots, people-powered campaign and [make a contribution today.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/29OVtx7WK/c?w=2hAMi3oevePaRisx-zmJvibbaH_vrFBpgZGFIpOyMNs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjM2YzgzYmFmLTk4MWMtNGVjYS05YzBhLWY5NzRhNTA4NmFhYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)

Yet, massive tax cuts for billionaires and giant corporations -- along with losses of union-supported livable wage job -- have led to a $50 trillion transfer of wealth from working class people's homes and retirement accounts to the uber-rich. It's sinful. If it wasn't for billionaries' tax cuts and wars in Afghanistan and Iraq, our national debt today would be zero, instead of over $30 trillion. There are other ways of addressing the national debt than cutting services to those who need it the most. Holding the deficit ransom if Democrats don't agree - also immoral. In total, the debt ceiling has been revised 78 times since the '60s. Since 1960, Republicans have led a vote to revise the debt ceiling 49 times. Defaulting on our debt would result in an immediate recession. There are other ways to address our national debt. We must spend wisely, help people in need, and support small businesses, families, and workers. This fight starts in districts like ours, in the rural heartland, where small town America thrives. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula need a fighter in Congress; someone who can stand up to the corporate big wigs and lobbyists, and I'm eager for that job. {{FirstName}} - Please join my grassroots, people-powered campaign and | | | | | | | you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | You've been e-mailed this content because of information you've supplied through previous contributions to our cause. | | May 7, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 10
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** This past Sunday, I was honored to speak at the Black Sunday commemoration ceremony in Falls Church, Virginia, with Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares. Black Sunday, which falls on April 30th of every year, is a day to observe and reflect upon the fall of Saigon and of South Vietnam. Forty-eight years after the fall of Saigon, I am grateful that we escaped days before that fateful 30th day of April 1975. My father, a South Vietnamese government official then, would have been sent to a re-education camp, tortured, or even killed. My life would have taken a different trajectory if the United States had not opened its doors to us or the millions of other refugees. Unfortunately, hundreds of thousands of Vietnamese didn’t have that luxury. Over 250,000 South Vietnamese soldiers and nearly 60,000 American soldiers died during the Vietnam War. Today, Vietnam is still suffering under one-party communist rule. As a nation of immigrants, we have a responsibility as proud Americans to ensure that what happened in Vietnam on April 30th, 1975, can never happen in the United States. We are a beacon of liberty and freedom for the rest of the world, and I’m proud to be fighting with Unleash America to preserve that for future generations. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=de8341c0ecad4631b803dfc81bb8709a&_e=OIxL_lSxe4siwXYAXQWKH71OfUMivF39d58KW8318mWpmD76db9qAr2BBT3Q3GornKSnLrVtn8l_iglfYEWJdWIwkl2Ku1CimYR07-mSeFKdbrvP9gNTzBHfIKVqhOXeI6Je4jlJQEd4QCvwXFV8kP7-UtF5xEsef_pn0x6oscWoR0t6imA-tVIeVDQ8_CRJAIK8WG4UVIkHpjhRDDcmYlCoEGCmqzs-M6C9w3PUSOnAL8t_Vgp0e6k0zYFIsrywcN6VJRfBWZxnDbnplJpawmUds2lIEnNklfeVcj2JHWE%3D)

Democrats in Virginia are sticking to their usual playbook of alienating parents. The Democrat running for the state House of Delegates trashed parents who want to be involved in their children’s education, saying parents' desire to have input in the curriculum equates to indoctrination. Hung Cao told Fox News, “As a taxpayer, parent, and product of Virginia Public Schools, this is incredibly offensive," Cao said. "Someone who minimizes the role of parents, and suggests our desire to be involved is indoctrination, doesn’t deserve to be in a position of leadership."
Read the full article [here](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=de8341c0ecad4631b803dfc81bb8709a&_e=OIxL_lSxe4siwXYAXQWKHwPvCIlunUkRFHIdjYxjOHyY863iBy9Mnoo4EHAwsjyMAQ3QVZaad6NiA82lHILUfsBZmaayeZ2fK8bLYNJ-2gPZKFJ35uBYXslEWxV13-Kc5M3a_cHo5WTUcBWpEGz_8NPxaOpm_d2CkM1C1wMMzHTrUI9BXk7FsG86gXsW0ZMW0MriClAX2zRASWi5BojoAEGk8pK49baBrb4LVBFW43Up5GoakBqx0sBZoXqTCkYEJI31xG8NQWdmH3FSMX_Di91RJm_PFf444Rtc3veSAM7nDEQWE8QLFBsMhb-Cz2HeOrdgfYBCy9ASWdGgg1T2Hghwgi6BoLNXGXoznsxUoCZkKuK0eNgsdgW3AKvfsMEs1cLyqhTcWevKi01xab8Lbea-apxvSlr_i_5i3JX4FfA%3D).

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Save bumblebees from toxic pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760180?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**Ssshh... Listen very carefully, Friend**_... With springtime in full bloom, you should expect to hear the soft sound of buzzing bees among the colorful flowers in your backyard garden or city park._**But in recent years, that familiar sound is much less audible... **_ That’s because wild bee populations are rapidly _**DYING OUT.** _We’ve already lost **87%** of the Rusty-Patched Bumblebee, **89%** of the American Bumblebee, and **93%** of the Western Bumblebee populations over the last two decades! Now, **40% of all insect pollinators,** including many bee species, are on the BRINK OF __**EXTINCTION.**_ _Bumblebees aren’t just beloved backyard staples but are critical pollinators that are important for our food supply and ecosystems. But the EPA has _**FAILED**_ to act -- instead, the agency allows Big Ag companies like Bayer-Monsanto to continue to profit from these **dangerous pesticides.** [**Please don’t let corporate greed WIPE OUT our precious bees Friend. Demand action NOW! >> **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760181?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760182?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Neonics are absolutely _**FATAL**_ to bees and other pollinators that we rely on for _1 in 3 bites of food we eat._ Plants take up neonics, from seed and root to flower and leaf, as well as the pollen and nectar that bees feed on. These potent chemicals are even _**infiltrating our soil and groundwater. **_
_**That’s not only dangerous for essential pollinators like birds and bees, but neonics are directly harmful to people too!**_ Friends of the Earth tested foods from major U.S. grocers and found neonics in 73% of applesauce and 80% of spinach samples. In fact, neonics are among the most commonly found pesticides in baby food. Neonics have been linked to serious health problems, including birth defects of the heart and brain and hormone disruption.
[**For far too long, the EPA has looked the other way while Big Ag threatens people, pollinators, and the planet with its toxic bee-killing pesticides. So we need 4,031 more environmentalists like you by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to add public pressure. Can we count on you to step up right now and urge the EPA to BAN NEONICS before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760183?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760182?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for fighting to protect our pollinators and the planet!
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17095?t=6&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y) Team,

In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [**pitch in to support Ron Be Gone and my campaign for U.S. Senate**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17097?t=8&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y) ahead of tonight's fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?

Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.

As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, Tucker Carlson, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.

Just last month, McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.

**It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit tonight's fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.

Pitch in now to help:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17103?t=14&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17104?t=15&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17105?t=16&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y)
Investing _now_ and building the campaign infrastructure to break through the Republicans’ noise and reach voters across California is going to be the key to success in this race. Thanks for anything you can contribute to help.

— Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1794%2E564421%2ExFZz6y).**

| AS A FORMER HOMESCHOOL MOM YOU KNOW I'M PRO-SCHOOL CHOICE
---
| Dear Friends, Please WATCH this video. While others talk about school choice, I've actually done it.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n2KbRAisZ75tU_FjyLDKJ1n2h1wBEFiVzr4sCnahWfGVMuM7alETXMwf4vV2IDp5JqBHoQ1vZez1Gl9DmjqRtTeS1gYYJ0yx96Pem4D_p-33iz6swWFmY6HYIZuJdAkz4I39AM2ToL-qr4GeHiQ9N4NBxYb_9AbWDoSFXrBkXSk=&c=aslnB0NLWYgv_Vx5OS2fXSsaNPIQ4xykgoMwRPwZGT8mPI8REaftUA==&ch=TxWaOSsE9mgLsHiC2oLJ0sclxEpH0ZSijtOo5bWGlLWyb9Y_pzFnoQ==)
---
You can count on me to support school choice in Virginia. I have an 8 year voting record that shows I've supported every school choice bill that's come before me, including sponsoring legislation supporting Educational Savings Accounts, Charter Schools and the Tebow Bill.
We homeschooled our 4 children for 8 years, educated them in a private Christian School and later in a public high school.
Parents need more choice, not less. We're tired of the cookie cutter one size fits all educational system that is determined to indoctrinate our kids into leftist woke ideology. If parents do choose to send their children to school, they should still be in the driver's seat, not the back seat.
We need to protect our children's innocence and not allow politics to dictate their safety and well-being.
Parents know their students best and should have more choice, not less. A child's zip code shouldn't determine their level of education. You can continue to count on me to champion school choice in Virginia.
For God & Country, Amanda Chase
---

Peter,

Rhode Island proudly leads the nation in offshore wind development. Our Blue Economy is showing the rest of the country and the world how we can cut energy costs, reduce emissions, and create thousands of good-paying, union jobs all at the same time.

As a member of the House Natural Resources Committee, Seth is focused on how affordable, clean energy will continue to benefit the economy of Rhode Island and how we can share Rhode Island’s wind energy leadership with the rest of the country.

We must continue our investments in clean energy programs — because there is no alternative. This is about creating jobs with strong wages while ensuring that we leave a healthy planet behind for future generations.

[Will you take two minutes to share your opinion on clean energy and the importance of reducing emissions by completing this short survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62957986/405092272/-854800335?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230507_SV_1.1_0_6MO_SethMagaziner.com_NA_NA_cleanenergy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2U5OWYxOC0yNGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hUFZ3IrrrmyVab3JlbU5PUViPeRXNn6t08moWGBOtZA=&emci=2d69b510-24ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=33e99f18-24ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

In Congress, Republicans are trying hard to roll back many of the pro-climate and clean energy programs enacted in last year’s _Inflation Reduction Act_. If they succeed, jobs will be lost and much of our progress will be erased.

It’s crucial that we block them, protect all of the pro-climate legislation we’ve passed so far, and continue building towards a clean energy future for every American.

[This is such an important topic, so Seth wants to hear directly from you. Take two minutes to complete our clean energy survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62957989/405092275/-854800335?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230507_SV_1.1_0_6MO_SethMagaziner.com_NA_NA_cleanenergy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2U5OWYxOC0yNGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hUFZ3IrrrmyVab3JlbU5PUViPeRXNn6t08moWGBOtZA=&emci=2d69b510-24ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=33e99f18-24ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

subject: Confirm you WON'T vote for Trump >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **ALERT: New poll shows 53% of voters "definitely would not" vote for Trump next year -- _but we don't know if YOU are one of them!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13424?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230507-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPollV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230507-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPollV1-Pros-sl1&akid=10680%2E9716520%2EOsLzlM)
**Please confirm before MIDNIGHT:****Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Trump >>**
| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/13424?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230507-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPollV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230507-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPollV1-Pros-sl1&akid=10680%2E9716520%2EOsLzlM)
---

Team, this is HUGE: According to a new poll, **53% of Americans say they _definitely won’t_ vote for Trump for president next year.**

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be _**razor-close!**_

If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 73 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. **So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year:**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Trump >>**
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/13424?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230507-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPollV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230507-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPollV1-Pros-sl1&akid=10680%2E9716520%2EOsLzlM)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckcuOljAUx5-m7CBwWlpdsFARk0km0cRvdEcKPYX69YKlSPDpDTgzi9n-evK_VbrFGn00RHwkALNRKwEg9AMB2BJ9krfbYzxyYA_5l_oJpvMRPhGAdCz4evksUqCTxp5UtJlqGMhKjxk2FX9H6xIY49ncDFJqjVyPnCEySTlTkgsqBv0eqwpZZhoogZZ1KYBSWotCUM1YLUBUQ4WsEoSVl1GhI2Kajb9jVNLYoxiDy2wzp7SsV7COQLfiuEUsduMjqvOCQKeClwlTUPIg0N3lOufB5b-k5-McTCS025Lr17DFEQltdVKUAD-ZQ2U2R2j7XPWCo3SLNJMntP0fPNdmmtNu0nxq95edCb4PSzLO_MV-QGvwD55qsn9bo38N0g8x3DHKCfuXTV4sg0_oE6GtH23-877Hzw83-fUbAd57axSh7Rt4fS1tf_94_M53W2WxUcturDUrPxedrkXH4P4FAAD__yDKrMk)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckU9vnDAQxT-NuYFgbMPugUNTRKVKuTWpckIGDzBd_yHGdEU_fQVNIjXX34zee_NG2cXQuNesemAAM-mVATD-hQFskT-rp6fHsKcgvqff5DNMxxC-MoC4L_ix-SaSoVVkDlo1ia4FqGIcEqyL8sJlDkKUyVz3eXmVF6FkOarxwqW-Fr3MC47XXlYCVEI15MBzmVfAOZdVVvFRCFlBVfQFiqJiIj-NsjEgxpncDYNWZPZs8DYx9Rzjsp7BWgbtisMWMLuTC6iPDQat9k5FjF6rnUF7U-ucepv-Uq4cZk-B8XaLtlv9FgZkvBmj5gzKg1nUtFnGm7dTTzgouyiaHOPNv-DpSNMc7xTnQ7s77ci7zi-RLP3BrkdD-BsPNdV9PqP7CNL1wd8wqAm7907eLb2L6CLjjRtM6oaXB_HyGoNmUHbOkD4H_8Hztbx5_fn4o7ybIgm1Xu5kDK3l0eh0Njp4-zcAAP__FpSrvQ)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckU1vnDwQxz-NubGCsbGXA4fnKd1KkSL10GyPyIsHmK5fiDFd0U9fQZMccv159H-zdrOlYWuY-p8BTGQWBsD4fwxgTfyqX16e45aDeMq_VVcY90f4wgDSNuPH5ZvICZ0mu1PVZqYRoMuhz7Ap5ZlXBQghs6kpJZc4CAk1H8qbGqraGMHPVXGu61qoKqMGCuBFVSjgnFfqpPggRKVAlbcSRamYKA6j0xAR00T-jtFostupDy6zzZTSvBzBLgwuC_ZrxNODfESzXzC4mOB1whSM3hhc7nqZ8uDyX9rLfgoUGb-syXVLWGOPjLdDMpyB3JlDQ6tjvH2resBeu1nT6Blv_wXPBxqn9KA07drdYUfBd2FO5OgPdje0hL9xV9Pd5xrdR5DuFsMdox6xe9_k3TL4hD4x3vre5kv1-vW7eLrWVway85YM4-0neHwtb19_Pv-QD1tmsTHzg6ylRe6LjseifXB_AwAA__8eKaoG)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.
